description:
READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



***APPLICANTS MUST HAVE PROVEN VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH FACILITIES OR PROPERTY SERVICE BUSINESSES (E.G., PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS, FACILITIES MANAGEMENT, TENANT SERVICES, OR BUILDING MANAGEMENT)***



We're looking for a reliable, detail-focused Virtual Assistant to join us.



In this role, you’ll work closely with our office managers. Your job is to handle the day-to-day admin and documentation tasks so our managers can focus on higher-level client support and business growth.



If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and helping small businesses run smoothly, this could be a great fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Prepare and send invoices for services and products

• Process registrations, documentation, and related records

• Complete and submit required forms and paperwork

• Assist with permits, applications, and administrative documentation as needed

• Create simple, professional social media posts

• Organize digital files and maintain accurate records

• Provide general administrative support to managers and tea
mbers as needed

• Helping with customer-related follow-ups when needed



What We're Looking For:

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) - MUST

• Solid experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an administrative support role - MUST

• Background supporting facilities or property service business - MUST

• Experience handling rebates, permits, or compliance paperwork - ADVANTAGE

• Comfortable creating basic social media content

• Tech-savvy and confident, learning new systems quickly

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision



Work Details:

• Full-time, remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



To apply for this position, please follow the steps below:

   1. Use "VA" as the subject line of your application

   2. Submit a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

   3. Include a link to your CV



****WE WILL NOT CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH NO CVS/RESUMES.***

title: Lead Conversion & Appointment Qualification Specialist with competitive pay and up to $1000 Quarterly bonus
description:
We are hiring a Lead Conversion & Appointment Qualification Specialist to handle inbound leads and turn them into confirmed, high-quality appointments.



Your job is simple:



-Call new leads immediately



-Qualify motivation and readiness



-Book real appointments



-Prepare the hottest leads for John Tran to call



-This role directly impacts revenue and requires speed, accuracy, and discipline.



Responsibilities:

-Call new leads within 30 seconds of arrival

-Qualify leads based on motivation, timeline, and intent

-Convert tentative interest into confirmed appointments

-Reduce no-shows through proper confirmation

-Update CRM notes clearly and accurately

-Prepare and update a daily list of the hottest leads for John



KPIs:



-Tentative-to-actual appointment conversion rate



-Lead response time (30-second standard)



-Appointment show-up rate



-Accuracy and quality of daily hot-lead updates





Requirements:



-Strong phone communication skills

-Follows instructions exactly

-Organized and detail-oriented

-Fast response time and sense of urgency

-Coachable and accountable

-Sales, customer service, or real estate experience is a plus.

-Fast-paced

-Performance-driven

-High accountability



How to Apply:

Submit your resume and a short explanation of why you’re a good fit and submit it to 
 with the subject: Lead Conversion Specialist - Tran Real Estate Group

title: Graphic Designer and Presentation Specialist - Remote, Full-Time
description:
We're a growing marketing brand building YouTube content and social media for the DTC and ecommerce space. We need a designer who can create clean, modern visuals for our content.



What you'll do:

Design charts, diagrams, and infographic-style visuals for YouTube videos. Build visual layouts on digital whiteboards (Miro, we'll train you on this). Create social media carousel graphics in Canva. Design presentation-style slides that explain marketing concepts visually. Source and edit images for content. Take design briefs and turn them into polished visuals.



What we're looking for:

Strong Canva skills (required). Experience designing presentations, infographics, or social media graphics. Good eye for clean, minimal, modern design. Comfortable learning new tools quickly (Miro, Figma, AI chart tools). Detail-oriented with spacing, alignment, fonts, and consistency. Available during US business hours (minimum 4 to 6 hours overlap with EST). Strong written English.



Bonus:

Experience with Figma or Miro. Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E). Familiarity with YouTube content or marketing. Video thumbnail design experience.



Our style: Dark backgrounds, white text, minimal color, clean sans-serif fonts. Modern and professional but not corporate. Think educational YouTube content, not PowerPoint presentations.



How to apply:

Send a short intro about yourself. Include 2 to 3 examples of your design work (social media graphics, presentations, infographics, anything visual). Tell me which tools you use most."

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator (Structural)
description:
We are currently looking to add to our growing team. We are a USA-based takeoff & estimating service company. This position is for remote in-house estimators/Quality Control Reps. Please read the job details and respond accordingly to our questions to be considered. Thank you!



We are looking for Immediate Hire:



Position 1: Structural Estimators like wood/Lumber package, steel framing, and metal framing





Job Details-You will be performing takeoffs and some quality control tasks



1. Full-time work available and even over time based on Performance & Quality Of Work-We can offer stable consistent work to the right person (Full Time Preferred)

2. Some training is provided but must have prior experience

3. Must have 5+ Years of experience

4. Must have an engineering or architectural degree or equal estimator experience

5. Must Speak English

6. Must have Planswift Software (No Exception, please don't apply if you don't have this software)

7. Must have good math skills

8. Must be able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

9. Must know how to use Microsoft excel

10. USA takeoff experiences a PLUS but not necessary

11. Must be a team player

12. Must be able to work daytime EST

13. Must be able to work some weekends, depending on workload

14. Must be very responsive

15. Must be reliable and available during your shift.



We have a base starting pay rate per this job post, if you prove your skills we do offer pay raises and bonuses. We also have many management positions to which you can be promoted to.



****To be considered please send the following answered questions****



1. Have you read the job description above thoroughly and can you comply with most requirements?

2. Do you have experience in Lumber Framing and Drywall? This area is particularly busy for us, so any experience would be PLUS. Please elaborate.

3. Tell us about your related experience

4. What is your area of expertise?

5. Why should we hire you?

6. Do you have a home office?

7. How is your internet Speed?

8. How many years of actual takeoff and estimating experience do you have? with US experience?

9. What is your availability and how soon can you start?

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are seeking for a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: B2B Sales Represenatative
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Identify and generate sales leads through prospecting, website inquiries, databases, cold-calling, and other promotional strategies.

- Schedule and conduct virtual meetings and presentations with potential clients.

- Develop and deliver compelling sales presentations on company products and services.

- Maintain accurate records of sales activities, prospects, and customer interactions in the company CRM.

- Track customer reorders and follow up to ensure continued satisfaction.

- Communicate customer and prospect product pain points to appropriate departments.

- Maintain a well-developed pipeline of prospects.

- Collaborate with internal teams to address customer pain points and improve offerings.

- Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers and prospect.

- Consistently meet or exceed sales quotas and performance targets.



Qualifications:

- Fluent in English (both verbal and written) with excellent communication skills.

- Proven success in sales, with a strong track record of meeting or exceeding quotas.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while maintaining high productivity.

- Strong relationship-building and negotiation skills.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Branding Specialist - Permanent WFH
description:
We are looking for a dynamic Branding Specialist to take ownership of our brand identity and ensure it shines across every platform - digital, print, and product. This role combines creative vision, leadership, and tech-savvy system management to keep our brand consistent, innovative, and impactful.



What You’ll Do:

- Lead brand strategy and ensure consistency across all customer touchpoints.

- Supervise and collaborate with our IT Web Developer and Digital Marketing Specialist.

- Oversee website updates, marketing campaigns, and cross-team alignment.

- Manage and optimize our Odoo system, Microsoft 365, and SharePoint.

- Create and maintain content assets—brochures, presentations, training guides, and more.

- Administer communications tools (RingCentral) and eLearning content.

- Drive process improvements and innovative solutions.





What We’re Looking For:

- Strong eye for branding and design consistency.

- Experience managing marketing and digital teams.

- Hands-on knowledge of Odoo (or similar ERP/CRM systems).

- Tech-savvy with Microsoft 365, SharePoint, and digital tools.

- Creative problem-solver with excellent organizational skills.



Why Join Us?

You’ll play a key leadership role in shaping Cube Care’s brand and driving growth. If you’re ready to bring fresh ideas, collaborate across teams, and make an impact, we’d love to hear from you!







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: (CPA) Certified Public Accountant
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embodies Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Certified Public Accountants!



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze, organize, update financial records.

- Perform regular, detailed audits to ensure accuracy in financial documents, expenditures, and investments.

- Perform daily reconciliation of credit card, bank accounts, cash accounts, spending accounts, etc.

- Setup financial accounts as needed.

- Oversee ledger reconciliation and manage accounts payable/receivables.

- Liaise with Tax Accountants to track tax payments and returns.

- Monitor bookkeeping activities regularly.

- Keep company financial information confidential.

- Ensure vendor accounts are kept up to date for the entire organization.

- Inventory Management

- China Purchase Management



Qualifications:

- Excellent FLUENT English verbal and written communication.

- Candidate must possess at least Bachelor’s/College Degree in relevant field.

- Proven work experience as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA).

- Understanding of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP).

- Preferably experienced accounting/finance employees specializing in US Accounting System.

- Motivation to exceed expectations while working independently

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

title: SDR – Cold Email Inbox Manager
description:
SDR – Cold
 Inbox Manager (Remote – Worldwide | Contract, Full-Time)

We’re hiring an SDR at Hajimatic to manage inbound replies from cold
 campaigns and convert them into qualified booked meetings.

You won’t be doing outbound prospecting.

You’ll be working inside live inboxes, handling real conversations that directly impact pipeline.



What you’ll own

Managing cold
 inboxes across multiple campaigns

Responding to leads (positive, neutral, objections)

Qualifying prospects based on ICP and offer fit

Booking meetings onto sales calendars

Keeping inboxes organized and up to date

Identifying patterns in replies and feeding insights back to the team



What we’re looking for

Strong written communication (clear, natural, not robotic)

Ability to handle objections in writing

Good judgment when qualifying leads

High attention to detail across multiple threads

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment



Must-haves

Fluent written English

Experience in sales, support, or client communication

Ability to respond quickly and accurately

Organized and process-driven



Nice-to-have

Cold
 or SDR experience

CRM familiarity (HubSpot, Close, etc.)

Experience booking meetings for B2B services



Details

Remote – Worldwide

Contract (Full-Time)

Hours: 9am–5pm ET

Tools: Slack, Asana, CRM,
 platforms



How to apply

Reply with your resume and a short note on your experience handling written sales conversations and booking meetings.



If you’re fast, clear, and can turn conversations into meetings, this role is for you.



David

CEO at Hajimatic

title: Creative Agency Looking For Killer Video Editor
description:
We are a lean performance creative agency that works with 8 and 9-figure eCommerce brands.



We are looking to hire a new video editor to join our team. Looking for someone part-time that can eventually become full-time



- You should be a well rounded editor (that has experience producing UGC, VSLs and AI videos for Meta ads)

- You must be proactive and have initiative, we're not looking for a robot that is just taking commands

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
AI Automation Specialist

Company: Parakeet Communities, LLC

Reports to: CEO

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



WHO WE ARE



Parakeet Communities is a rapidly expanding real estate investment company that purchases, owns, and operates Manufactured Housing Communities and RV parks. Our mission is to cultivate communities that change the perception of mobile residencies and designate this style of living as the “future of real estate in America.” We encourage opportunities for growth, development, and promotion by providing our employees with the resources to continually strive to optimize success. We are committed to a safe, sustainable, and pleasant work environment. We build strength internally and treat one another with respect because morale is the foundation of success. Our brand thrives on the dedication to our communities and the way we treat our customers. This includes following safety provisions, complying with state and federal law, and approaching our responsibilities ethically. We conform to the highest professional standard; we turn challenges into wins. If you have a "Yes" attitude and want to contribute to the success of Parakeet's rapid expansion, we encourage you to apply for the listed position and join the "Flock!"



SUMMARY OF ROLE



The AI Automation Specialist will report directly to the CEO and play a key role in navigating process efficiency through intelligent automation. This role is ideal for someone with a passion for leveraging AI, digital forms, and business applications to streamline workflows, particularly in property management.



RESPONSIBILITIES



• Design and implement automation solutions using JotForm, AI tools, and Microsoft Power Apps to enhance operational efficiency across the organization.

• Develop, test, and maintain conceptual modules for workflow automation, with a focus on allocation measurement and process optimization.

• Collaborate with various departments to identify automation opportunities and translate business needs into scalable, automated solutions.

• Learn and utilize Rent Manager software (prior experience is a plus) to build integrations and automate property management processes. • Monitor, analyze, and report on the effectiveness of implemented automations, making ongoing improvements based on real-world performance.

• Formalize and Document processes, build user guides, and design staff trainings on new automation tools and workflows.

• Stay current with AI trends and automation best practices to ensure our technology stack remains competitive and effective.



QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE



• Proficiency with JotForm for creating and managing digital forms and workflows.

• First-hand experience with AI tools and automation platforms to solve business problems.

• Expertise with Microsoft Power Apps for creating custom business applications.

• Strong familiarity with property management workflows and challenges; direct experience in the field is highly desirable.

• Solid understanding of the Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook, etc.) for business productivity.

• Experience with Rent Manager is a significant plus; willingness and ability to learn the platform is required.

• Ability to conceptualize, design, and implement process modules that measure and allocate resources effectively.

• Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills—able to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions.

*  Self-starter with a curious mindset and a drive to continuously learn emerging tech and automation platforms.

* Familiarity with workflows for property management is a Plus!





                                                                   EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER



Parakeet is an equal employment opportunity employer. Employment and advancement opportunities are available to all individuals on an at-will basis, regardless of their race, color, national origin, religion, ancestry, citizenship status, military or veteran status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, family responsibilities, pregnancy, disability, genetic information, protective hairstyle, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law. Reasonable accommodation will be provided when requested by qualified individuals with disabilities unless such accommodation would result in an undue hardship to the Company.

title: Disaster Documentary  (Script Writer)
description:

Scripts typically range between 4,000–10,000 words depending on the topic. Writers will research real-world disasters (natural and man-made) and craft emotionally engaging, well-structured narratives designed for YouTube storytelling.

AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude may be used to assist with research and drafting, but the final script must be factually accurate, compelling, and humanized.

Prior YouTube or documentary-style writing experience is preferred but not required. Writers who consistently deliver high-quality scripts can expect steady monthly work.

 Flexible / Project-Based

Use AI tools to assist with drafting and research

Deliver scripts on schedule

Interest in storytelling, history, and real-world events

title: Recruiting Operations & Referral Support Virtual Assistant
description:
Full Time - Long Term - Real Estate Brokerage



We are a fast growing, high performance real estate brokerage operating across multiple states in the U.S. We are hiring a detail-obsessed, process-driven Virtual Assistant to support our Recruiting Department and Referral Operations.

If you love checklists, clean CRMs, accurate reporting, and keeping people on track, you will thrive here. If you miss details or need constant direction, this is not the right fit. 



What You Will Be Responsible For: 



 • Recruiting Pipeline Management - You will manage the administrative side of our recruiting process from initial inquiry through onboarding. This includes sending intake forms, tracking candidate progress, maintaining accurate CRM records, scheduling calls, sending reminders, executing follow up sequences, and ensuring every touchpoint is documented properly. Our leadership team makes hiring decisions. Your role is to ensure the process runs smoothly and cleanly.

 • CRM & Data Integrity - You will maintain strict CRM health and cleanliness. Every candidate must be tagged correctly, placed in the proper stage, and updated in real time. You will flag stalled conversations, protect deadlines, and ensure reporting numbers are accurate. Clean data is non-negotiable.

 • Reporting & Metrics Support - You will assist in preparing monthly recruiting reports by pulling and organizing performance data including appointments, interviews, conversions, onboarding progress, and retention metrics. Accuracy and timeliness matter.

 • Referral Operations & Documentation - You will support referral tracking from intake through payout. This includes logging referrals, maintaining tracking spreadsheets, organizing agreements and W 9s, monitoring key dates, and ensuring compliance documentation is complete. You will also send structured status updates to agents and leadership.

 • Process & SOP Maintenance - You will help formalize and maintain internal processes. This includes organizing Google Drive systems, updating SOP documents, maintaining
 and text templates, and keeping workflows aligned as processes evolve.

 • Quality Control & Escalation - Before marking any task complete, you are responsible for verifying that records are updated, documentation is uploaded, and communication has been sent. You will escalate when deadlines are at risk, responses are missing, or compliance or financial issues arise.



What This Role Is Not - This role does not include interviewing candidates and making hiring decisions. If successful in other areas, there could be room for growth in the future. 



Ideal Candidate

 • Extremely detail oriented

 • Comfortable managing multiple moving parts

 • Strong written English required, strong spoken English preferred 

 • Experienced with CRMs and Google Drive

 • Process driven and structured

 • Able to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours (TBD but able to work an 8-hour shift between 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM) 

Real estate experience is a plus, but operational discipline matters more.



Employment Information

 • Employee will be paid according to our pay periods: For dates 11th - 25th and 26th - 10th, they will receive funds on the 15th and 30th of each month. 

 • Employee will be paid in US currency, via OnlinePH Easy pay. 

 • Employee must have a time tracking set via OnlinePh.

title: Senior Technical SEO Specialist (WordPress, Link Building, Site Audits, AI SEO)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency looking for a Senior Technical SEO Specialist to join our team long term.



This role is not for beginners. We are looking for someone with at least 5 years of hands-on SEO experience and a proven track record of ranking websites organically.



You will work closely with our local SEO team, developers, content team, and leadership to improve the organic performance of multiple client websites.



You must be comfortable managing multiple projects at once, communicating with teams regularly, and executing both technical SEO and off-page SEO strategies.



This role will manage roughly 20 websites, with a deeper focus on 6–10 priority sites per month.



We are looking for someone who understands modern SEO, including emerging strategies like AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to help our clients rank in AI-powered search results.



Responsibilities

Technical / On-Page SEO

Optimize meta titles and descriptions

Implement proper H-tag structure

Manage image alt tags

Improve site speed and performance

Internal linking strategy

Schema implementation

Page structure optimization

Technical issue identification and resolution



Off-Page SEO

Link building strategies

Backlink audits

Link removal / disavow

Competitor backlink research

Outreach strategy

Finding high quality link opportunities



SEO Strategy & Analysis

Keyword research

Competitor analysis

Site audits

Content gap analysis

Technical audits

SEO roadmap development

Reporting

Create monthly SEO reports

Present performance improvements

Monitor rankings and traffic trends

Identify new SEO opportunities



Tools We Use

You do not need to know all tools already, but experience with similar platforms is important.

Our main tools include:

Search Atlas

Ahrefs

Slack

ClickUp

Apploye (time tracking)



Website Platforms:

WordPress

Elementor Pro

Various CMS platforms (depending on the client)



Hosting Platform:

Cloudways

Team Collaboration



You will work closely with:

Our Local SEO team

Our website developers

Our content writers

Our graphic design team

Company leadership



Communication is extremely important to us. You will need to actively communicate updates, strategies, and results.



Work Schedule

We strongly prefer someone who can work U.S. business hours or partially overlapping hours to collaborate with the team.



Requirements

Minimum 5 years SEO experience



Strong understanding of:

Technical SEO

On-page SEO

Link building

Keyword research

Competitor analysis

SEO reporting



Experience with:

WordPress

Site audits

SEO tools

Backlink analysis



Bonus experience:

AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)

GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

AI search optimization



Must be able to manage multiple client websites simultaneously.



Communication Expectations

Communication is very important for this role.

You must be comfortable:

Providing updates

Asking questions

Working with multiple tea
mbers

Documenting work

Reporting results to leadership



Salary Range



Depending on experience:

$1,200 – $2,000 USD per month. We will start at $1200 and increase to $1500 at 6 months. And, depending on results, we can increase to $2,000 after a year and audit of all sites and work done within that year.

Top performers with proven SEO results may earn higher compensation and bonuses.



How To Apply (IMPORTANT)

We receive many applications, so we want to make sure applicants actually read the full job description.

When applying, please include the phrase:

"SEO is both technical and strategic."

Include it at the top of your application message.

Applications without this phrase will not be considered.



Also include:

Your years of SEO experience

3 websites you helped rank

The SEO tools you use most often

A brief explanation of your technical SEO process when starting a new project



Why Join Our Team

Long-term position

Work with a structured SEO team

Opportunity to grow with a fast-growing agency

Work on a wide variety of industries

Stable and organized systems



If you are passionate about SEO and enjoy solving technical challenges, we would love to hear from you.

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
Administrative Assistant — Cultivate Roots Coalition & Raysdwild Farm

Part-Time / Full- Time | Remote

Overview

We are seeking a part-time Administrative Assistant to support both Cultivate Roots Coalition (nonprofit) and RaysDWild Farm. This role handles all back-end administrative responsibilities, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations across both organizations. The position is primarily remote with occasional in-person needs.

?

Key Responsibilities

• Calendar Management:

Maintain and coordinate the shared calendar for both the nonprofit and the farm, including appointments, events, group visits, and internal schedules.

• Research:

Conduct research as needed for programs, events, operations, farm activities, and administrative needs.

• Paperwork & Forms:

Complete, submit, organize, and follow up on all necessary paperwork, including applications, forms, and internal documents.

• Invoicing & Billing:

Prepare and send invoices; manage basic billing tasks and follow-up communications where needed.

• Communication:

Handle incoming and outgoing communication via phone,
, and messaging platforms. Respond to inquiries, schedule groups, and coordinate visitor logistics.

• Group Visit Coordination:

Manage scheduling and logistics for educational groups or tours coming to the farm or nonprofit programs.

• General Administrative Support:

Assist with tasks that support daily operations, record keeping, and organizational workflows.

?

Skills & Qualifications

• Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.

• Clear communication skills (phone,
, and written).

• Comfort with general administrative tasks and working independently.

• Ability to manage invoicing and basic billing.

• Familiarity with common tools such as Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs) or similar systems.

• Ability to be flexible and switch between nonprofit tasks and farm-related tasks as needed.

?

Work Environment

• Part-time role (hours discussed during hiring).

• Primarily remote, with occasional on-site responsibilities when required.

• Works directly with leadership overseeing both the nonprofit and the farm.

title: Capcut/Tik-Tok Editor
description:
Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head w/ overlays - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.







Talking head with green/screeen overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video. And also being able to green screen my talking content to be used as an overlay









B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.









You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Can turn around assignments within a 24 hour time frame

Able to work 6-7 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300/month + bonuses for 2-3h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a 

salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create this reference video:



Reference video: 



Google drive: 



Video Instructions







Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

WATCH THE LOOM

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video

title: LinkedIn Outreach Virtual Assistant (Part Time, 4 Hours Per Day, Long Term)
description:
Location: Remote

Type of Work: Part Time (with option to go Full Time)



About The Role

We help founder-led B2B service providers book more sales calls and win more clients using LinkedIn outbound. 



I am looking for a detail-oriented LinkedIn Outreach Specialist who can manage multiple LinkedIn accounts daily, follow our proven outreach system, and keep the pipeline clean and moving. 

You will start at 4 hours per day with a clear path to full-time if you perform well.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants stable work and to grow with one client, not hop from gig to gig.



What You Will Do



For each LinkedIn account you will:



Manage AI lists and ensure connection requests are sent to the correct ICP

Run daily outreach messages to already connected 

Manage multiple messages per day

Send scheduled follow-up messages to non-responders using a cadence

Reply to simple inbound messages using our guidelines

Tag and hand off warm leads via a Calendar booking or Calednly

Log all activity, replies and call bookings in Kondo or CRM

Send a short end-of-day report with numbers and notes



Success In This Role Looks Like



On a typical week, working 4 hours per day:



Send 100 targeted messages per day

Manage all replies handled within 24 hours

Zero missed or forgotten warm replies

Clean, accurate tracking for every prospect touched via Kondo 

Reliable daily reporting without chasing

Weekly Reporting & Monthly Reporting

Being a part of Dedicated Slack Channels with clients



Requirements



Excellent written English and clear understand of tone of voice

Experience with LinkedIn outreach or B2B lead generation

Comfortable using LinkedIn, Sales Navigator and Google Sheets

High attention to detail, especially with names, companies and tags

Can follow SOPs exactly and improve once you master them

Reliable laptop, strong internet and ability to work consistently and VPN

Minimum 6 months of using LinkedIn

Minimum of 2 years as Appointment Settings/ DMs or Lead Generation



Nice to have:



Experience booking calls for agencies, coaches or B2B services



Hours and Compensation



4 hours per day, 5 days per week



Working hours must overlap at least 2 hours with Central European Time



Starting rate: 3 to 5 USD per hour, depending on experience

Performance-based bonuses for hitting call booking and reply targets

Strong performers will be offered a full-time position



How To Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



Applications that do not follow these steps will NOT be considered.



Use this subject line exactly:



Subject: LINKEDIN VA – [Your Name]



In the
 body, answer these 4 questions in English:



What daily LinkedIn outreach volume have you handled before?

What tools have you used for LinkedIn (for example, Sales Navigator, spreadsheets, CRMs)?

Describe one campaign where your outreach directly led to booked calls or sales.

What hours in your local time can you work consistently?



Attach or link to:

A 2-minute Loom or video introducing yourself and walking through your past LinkedIn outreach experience.

One screenshot of a LinkedIn or DM conversation you handled that led to a call or strong lead (you can blur names).

At the very end of your
, write the word “Dragon” so I know you read everything.



Send your application to: 



Start date ASAP or before January 5th 2026.

Job Title: Construction Project Coordinator

Company: YU SR STUDIO LLC

Job Summary:

The construction project coordinator coordinates the assigned project activities. They are expected to plan, coordinate, and organize various activities of a construction project and work with various members of the project team and the client to make sure goals are met on time, under the direction of the Project Management Team. This position provides a unique opportunity for the successful candidate to be exposed to and interact with multiple disciplines within company and contracted vendors, such as landscape architects, architects, engineering & design, and contractors.

Key Responsibilities:

- Ability to transfer key information and update to client.

- Ability to coordinate multiple projects simultaneously.

- Early involvement in the preliminary design process of projects to confirm compatibility with project estimates, project timeline & final delivery of approved plan.

- Help maintain project schedules and requirements.

- Ability to prioritize and manage several tasks and work as part of a team or individually as required.

- Readiness to take initiative with a flexible attitude and ability to deal with changes through different project phases.

- Maintaining comprehensive project documentation, including, but not limited to, Engineering Drawings, Architectural Drawings, Permit Processing form and documentation.

- Assist with creating and maintaining schedules (Design and Install schedules) and provide updates accordingly

- Assist in coordinating design conflicts, construction issues and discrepancies.

- Review and coordinate project changes with project stakeholders. Review the schedule and changes impacts with the design team and client.

- Assist in preparing invoice.

- Review drawings before submission (preferred, on-job training will be provided.)

- Set up and maintain all project files once the project has been committed.

- Spot check of third party production documents to ensure compliance.

- Co-chair project start-up and coordination design meetings as required.

- Attend project meetings as requested.

- Plan and execute corrective actions when necessary.

- Oversee and control the architectural drawing submittal/approval process.

title: Senior Operations & Bookkeeping Specialist (QuickBooks Enterprise)
description:
**IMPORTANT: This is a high-responsibility role for an independent professional. We are not looking for someone who needs to be trained on QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise. You must be an expert in Build Assemblies, BOMs, and E-commerce Order Entry from day one. A live technical navigation test will be required during the interview.**





We are seeking a high-level Operations & Bookkeeping Specialist to manage our bookkeeping and daily business workflow. This is a full-time role requiring expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise. You will be responsible for maintaining our financial records while also serving as the backbone of our order processing, inventory management, and customer service.



Key Financial & Bookkeeping Responsibilities:



• Full-Cycle QBD Bookkeeping: Manage all bank/credit card reconciliations and data entry within QuickBooks Enterprise Desktop.

• Advanced Reporting: Generate monthly P&L, Balance Sheets, and custom reports to track business health.

• A/P & A/R: Manage vendor bills, schedule payments, and monitor aging receivables.



Key Operations & Inventory Responsibilities:



• Inventory Control: Accurately enter and receive Purchase Orders (POs). Manage stock levels and perform Build Assemblies within QBD to reflect accurate finished goods.

• Order Entry: Monitor the company inbox for customer orders and enter them into QuickBooks with 100% accuracy.

• Customer Service: Act as the first point of contact for the general company inbox; respond to customer inquiries, tracking requests, and service issues with a professional tone.



Technical Requirements:



• Inventory Mastery: Must understand the difference between Non-Inventory, Inventory Part, and Assembly items in QBD.

• COGS Accuracy: Ability to troubleshoot and fix discrepancies in the Inventory Valuation Summary vs. Balance Sheet.

• Workflow Logic: Experience managing the Sales Order ? Picking/Packing ? Invoicing workflow (not just jumping straight to Invoices).

• Multi-Tasking: Ability to maintain a 100% "Zero Inbox" policy for customer service while managing complex month-end closes.



Qualifications & Skills:



• Experience: 4+ years of bookkeeping, specifically using QuickBooks Desktop (Enterprise preferred). Experience with US-based e-commerce or distribution is a major plus.

• Technical Setup: Must be comfortable working via Remote Desktop (RDP) or a hosted cloud environment.

• Inventory Knowledge: Proven experience handling Assemblies/BOM (Bill of Materials) and PO workflows.

• Communication: Exceptional written English for professional customer-facing
s.



Work Schedule & Compensation:



Rate: $7.00 - $9.00 per hour  (based on experience and verified QBD Enterprise expertise).

Hours: Full-time | Remote | 9AM–5PM EST (40 hours/week).

Benefits: paid US holidays, and performance-based annual raises.



How to Apply:



In your application, briefly describe a time you had to fix an 'Out of Balance' reconciliation in QuickBooks Desktop that wasn't caused by a simple missing transaction. What was the cause?

title: Marketing Agency Manager (Real Estate & Mortgage Tech)
description:
The Mission

We are on a mission to prove that homeownership is possible for everyone—even those with "less than perfect" scenarios. 



We need an out-of-the-box visionary to lead our marketing efforts, manage our creative team, and build a high-visibility personal brand for our CEO, Loan Officers, and Real Estate partners.



The Role

As our Marketing Agency Manager, you will be the bridge between high-level strategy and technical execution. You will work directly with the CEO to develop "viral" concepts and then work with our graphic designer, Automation Manager and video editor to bring them to life. You aren't just following trends; you are setting them.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Leadership: Partner with the CEO to create quarterly marketing themes. Bring fresh, disruptive ideas to the table based on current US real estate and mortgage trends.



Content Ecosystem: Manage the production of podcasts, webinars, TikToks, Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



AI Innovation: Use cutting-edge AI tools to create realistic AI twins for photo and video assets, allowing our agents to scale their presence without being on camera 24/7.



Social Media Management: Build and oversee content calendars for the company and our soon-to-be-onboarded ROs and LOs.Creative Direction: Manage our Graphic Designer to ensure all visuals are high-converting, "scroll-stopping," and brand-consistent.



Internal Hype: Market and celebrate our internal wins, closed loans, and success stories to build a culture of winning.



Industry Knowledge: Navigate the specific language of Credit Score Improvement, DPA, and Mortgage Lending to ensure all content is educational and compliant.



The Profile

Expert Knowledge: Deep understanding of the US Real Estate/Mortgage landscape and Credit Score mechanics.

Tech Savvy: Mastery of AI video/image tools (e.g., HeyGen, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, or similar).

Viral DNA: You understand the "hook, story, offer" framework and know how to capture attention in the first 2 seconds.

Leadership: Experience managing a creative team (designers, editors) and hitting deadlines.



The AI Portfolio: 

Please submit samples of AI-generated video or "digital twins" you have created.



The "Viral" Case Study: Or tell us of a  specific example of a video or campaign you managed that gained significant traction.



The Mortgage Test: Or how would you turn the topic of "FHA vs. Conventional for low credit credit scores" into a viral TikTok "hook."

title: Strategic Marketing Manager
description:
We are looking for a high-level **Marketing Manager** to own the lead generation engine for our multi-pillar ecosystem. Your mission is to take our "Turning NO into NOW" philosophy to the masses. You will oversee the marketing for our Credit Repair, Mortgage, and Real Estate arms, eventually leading an internal agency that provides "Done-For-You" marketing services for our 50+ Real Estate Agents.



---



Key Responsibilities



#### 1. The "No into Now" Lead Engine



* **Funnel Optimization:** Manage and optimize the **Project #1 ($29 Sub)** funnel. You will be responsible for the Cost Per Lead (CPL) and Conversion Rates.

* **Paid Media:** Oversee ad spend across
, Instagram, and Google, targeting "denied" homebuyers and score-specific audiences (500–580+).

* **Direct Response Copy:** Write high-converting ad copy and
 sequences that resonate with the "stressed renter" who wants to become a homeowner in 90 days.



#### 2. Brand Ecosystem Management



* **Multi-Pillar Synergy:** Ensure consistent branding across **Get House Ready** (Credit), **The Get Ready Group** (Insurance/Lending), and the **Real Estate Agency**.

* **Content Strategy:** Produce VSLs (Video Sales Letters), educational "Score Tips," and "Success Stories" from clients who moved from No to Now.



#### 3. Agent Marketing Agency (Future State)



* **Agent Branding:** Design and deploy marketing packages for our Real Estate Agents to help them recruit more "Credit-In-Progress" leads.

* **Recruiting Marketing:** Work with the Recruiter (**Project #14**) to run "Agent Attraction" campaigns showing why our team's tech is superior.



---

Technical Requirements



* **GHL Mastery:** You must understand **GoHighLevel** from a marketing perspective (Funnel builder,
 marketing, and Attribution reporting).

* **Ad Management:** Proven track record in **FB/IG Ads Manager**. You understand pixels, CAPI, and retargeting.

* **Content Creation:** Proficiency in **Canva**, **CapCut/Adobe Premiere**, and AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude) for rapid content production.

* **Analytics:** Ability to read a P&L for a marketing campaign. You should know exactly what it costs to acquire a $29 subscriber vs. a Mortgage lead.



---

The "Agency Leader" Mindset



* **Visionary:** You don't just see a credit repair lead; you see a future mortgage and insurance commission.

* **Data-Driven:** You make decisions based on what the dashboard says, not "vibes."

* **Leadership:** You are capable of eventually managing a team of editors, VA's, and media buyers.



---

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy, detail-obsessed **Transaction Coordinator** to manage the lifecycle of our real estate and mortgage files. This is not a traditional "paper-pushing" role. You will be the primary operator of our **GoHighLevel (GHL)** "Command Center," overseeing deals from the 
nt they go **Under Contract** to the final **Closing**.



You will bridge the gap between our Realtors, Loan Officers, Insurance Team, and the Title Company, ensuring every milestone—from inspections to clear-to-close—is hit within our **90-day "No to Now" timeline.**



---



Key Responsibilities



#### 1. Contract-to-Close Management



* **Milestone Oversight:** Use the GHL Command Center to trigger automated updates for inspections, appraisals, and title commitments.

* **Timeline Enforcement:** Monitor contingency periods (Inspection, Appraisal, Financing) and proactively alert agents before deadlines expire.

* **Document Compliance:** Review all executed contracts, addenda, and disclosures for accuracy and completeness.



#### 2. Cross-Department Coordination



* **Lending Liaison:** Work with the Jr. and Sr. Processors (**Project #12**) to ensure the mortgage file stays on track with the real estate closing date.

* **Insurance & Warranty:** Use internal GHL forms to coordinate Home Warranty selections and Insurance quotes via **The Get Ready Group**.

* **Communication:** Act as the "Concierge" for buyers and sellers, providing them with professional status updates via our automated SMS and
 systems.



#### 3. System Data Integrity



* **GHL Operations:** Update Opportunity stages and fill out "Milestone Forms" to keep our automated client communication accurate.

* **Closing Reconcile:** Ensure the final Settlement Statement (CD) matches the agreed-upon terms, including Home Warranty payments and any Realtor credits.



---



 Requirements



* **Experience:** 2+ years of experience in Real Estate Transaction Coordination or Mortgage Loan Processing.

* **Tech Proficiency:** Familiarity with **GoHighLevel (GHL)** is a major plus. Experience with DocuSign, DotLoop, or similar e-signature platforms is required.

* **The "TC Mindset":** Extreme attention to detail. You should be the person who catches the missing initial on page 12 of a 40-page contract.

* **Communication:** Ability to handle high-pressure situations with a calm, professional demeanor.



---



### ???? How You Will Work with Our GHL System



You will be the "Human Element" inside our automation. While the system sends the texts, **you** are the one who:



1. Verifies the Inspection is actually done before hitting the "Milestone" button.

2. Manually intervenes if a Buyer is confused by an automated request.

3. Ensures that our **"Turning NO into NOW"** brand promise is felt through every interaction.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Solutions Architect
description:
We are looking for a GoHighLevel Solutions Architect to design, build, and maintain our core business infrastructure. You won't just be setting up workflows; you will be responsible for the "blueprints" of our CRM, ensuring that every automation, integration, and data point is optimized for scale. The ideal candidate has a "systems-first" mindset and can translate complex business requirements into elegant, high-performance GHL environments.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

1. System Architecture & Strategy

• Snapshot Engineering: Design and deploy sophisticated, "break-proof" snapshots that can be replicated across sub-accounts.

• Data Modeling: Map out custom fields, tags, and values to ensure clean data reporting and prevent "tag bloat."

• Logic Mapping: Design the logic for lead routing, attribution, and multi-stage pipelines (Sales, Fulfillment, Retention).

2. Advanced Automations & Workflows

• Complex Logic: Build workflows using advanced branching (If/Else), webhooks, and Wait steps to manage long-term lead nurturing.

• Conflict Prevention: Audit existing workflows to eliminate "race conditions" where multiple automations fire at once and cause system errors.

• AI Integration: Implement GHL’s AI features (Content AI, Conversation AI) or integrate external LLMs via API for intelligent lead qualifying.

3. API & Third-Party Integrations

• Custom Connections: Use 
, Zapier, or custom API calls to bridge GHL with external tools (ERP, Custom Apps, specialized Dialers).

• Reporting Infrastructure: Set up tracking for UTM parameters and lead source attribution to ensure 100?curacy in the "Attribution" report.

4. Compliance & Quality Assurance

• Technical Health: Manage A2P 10DLC registrations, LC
/Mailgun deliverability, and domain health.

• QA Testing: Perform rigorous "end-to-end" testing on every funnel and workflow before they go live.

________________________________________

Technical Requirements

• Expert Proficiency: 3+ years of deep experience inside HighLevel (SaaS Mode preferred).

• Integration Master: High-level skill in 
 (Integromat) or Zapier is non-negotiable.

• Web Fundamentals: Working knowledge of CSS/JavaScript to customize GHL funnels and survey styles.

• Compliance Knowledge: Deep understanding of SMS/Email compliance (A2P, GDPR/CCPA).

• Documentation: Ability to create "Loom" videos and written SOPs for the systems you build.

________________________________________

The "Architect" Mindset (Soft Skills)

• Problem Solver: You don't just ask "how," you ask "why." You look for the simplest path to a complex result.

• Detail Obsessed: You notice the one missing "Tag" that would break a 20-step workflow.

• Strategic Communication: You can explain technical logic to non-technical stakeholders without using jargon.

title: Client Service Specialist (Phone-Based, Fast-Paced Role)
description:
This is a phone-heavy role. You will be on live calls with clients throughout the day. This is not a task-based or
-only position.



Peninsula Insurance Services is growing fast, and we’re hiring a Client Service Specialist who can handle real conversations, stay organized, and keep calls moving efficiently.



You will be the first point of contact for our clients. This role is structured, fast-paced, and requires you to think in real time while handling calls.



Our Philippines-based team has been a core part of our company for over six years. We have the systems and training in place, but success in this role comes from how you operate, not just what you’re told.



This is a long-term position with growth opportunity for the right person.



** What You’ll Do

- Handle inbound calls and voi
s throughout the day

- Help clients with payments, documents, and general service requests

- Follow scripts and processes for common situations

- Document all conversations clearly in our system

- Deliver insurance documents and follow up as needed

- Support onboarding and cancellation calls

- Stay organized while handling multiple tasks at once



** How This Role Actually Works (Read Carefully)



This role is highly structured at the beginning. You will be trained on scripts and processes so you know exactly what to do in common situations.



However, not every call will match a script.



Success in this role comes from:

- following the process when it applies

- staying within your role and not overreaching

- thinking through situations that don’t perfectly match a script

- keeping the call moving instead of freezing or over-asking for help



You are not expected to guess or go outside your role.

You are expected to stay in your lane, use the tools provided, and think calmly.



If you prefer waiting for instructions before taking action, this role will feel frustrating.



** What We’re Looking For

- Strong customer service experience (phone experience preferred)

- Comfortable being on the phone for the majority of the workday (this is not occasional call work)

- Able to follow structured processes consistently

- Can handle situations that don’t perfectly match a script

- Makes thoughtful decisions without overstepping

- Does not rely on others for every small question

- Strong English communication (written and verbal)

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to move quickly

- Comfortable learning and using multiple systems



Requirements

- Laptop or PC with dual monitors

- Stable internet connection

- Proven experience working full-time U.S. business hours (Eastern Time or similar)

- Applicants without prior U.S. schedule experience will not be considered

- 100% attendance during the 6-week training period



*** Required Application Questions (Must Answer) ***

FIRST QUESTION:

In 3–5 sentences:



A client calls with a request that does not clearly match any script or process you’ve been trained on.



Walk me through exactly what you would do step by step.



SECOND QUESTION:

Have you worked full-time U.S. business hours before?

If yes, include:

- Company name

- Your exact shift (include time zone)

- How long you worked that schedule

Applications without this information will not be reviewed.



** Compensation & Benefits

- $150 – $200 per week (based on experience), paid weekly

- Paid time off

- Paid U.S. holidays

- Long-term, stable position



** Final Note



This role is a great fit for someone who can follow a system, stay in their lane, and still think clearly when things are not perfectly defined.



If you’re looking for a role where every answer is given to you before you act, this is not the right fit.



If you’re ready to step up and be part of a team that expects more, apply now.

title: E-Commerce Virtual Assistant – Marketing, Customer Support & Store Management (AI-Powered)
description:
E-Commerce Virtual Assistant – Marketing, Customer Support & Store Management (AI-Powered)

About the Role

We're looking for a reliable and resourceful Virtual Assistant to support our e-commerce operations on a daily basis. This role sits at the intersection of marketing, customer service, and store management. You'll be the person who keeps everything running smoothly — from answering customers to helping execute marketing campaigns and keeping our stores in top shape.

You must be comfortable using AI tools daily to work faster and smarter. We don't want someone who does everything manually when AI can do it in minutes. If you're already using ChatGPT, Claude, or similar tools in your workflow, you'll fit right in.

This is a long-term position for someone who wants to grow with us, not a short-term gig.

What You'll Do

Customer Support (SAV)



Respond to customer inquiries via
, chat, and social media (DMs, comments) in a timely and professional manner

Handle refund requests, order issues, shipping questions, and complaints with a solutions-first approach

Process orders, track shipments, and coordinate with suppliers or fulfillment partners

Manage and update FAQs, canned responses, and support templates

Turn negative customer experiences into positive ones — we don't just "handle" tickets, we create fans



Marketing Support



Assist with
 marketing campaigns (Klaviyo, Omnisend, or similar): scheduling, list segmentation, basic copywriting

Help manage social media accounts: posting, scheduling, community engagement

Support product launches: coordinate assets, update store pages, prepare
 sequences

Research competitors, trending products, and marketing angles

Pull and organize performance data (ad metrics,
 open rates, conversion rates) into simple reports



Store Management



Update product listings, pricing, descriptions, and images on Shopify

Monitor inventory levels and flag low-stock items

Ensure store pages are error-free, links work, and the customer experience is smooth

Help with basic Shopify admin tasks (discount codes, collections, app management)



AI Integration



Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) daily to speed up tasks: drafting
s, writing product descriptions, creating customer responses, brainstorming marketing angles, summarizing data

Leverage AI for research: competitor analysis, trend spotting, content ideas

Use AI-powered design tools (Canva AI, Midjourney, or similar) to create visuals when needed

Continuously find new ways to integrate AI into your workflow to increase output and quality

You're not just a user — you know how to write effective prompts to get great results



Requirements



At least 1-2 years of experience as a VA in an e-commerce environment

Active and confident user of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) — this is non-negotiable

Hands-on experience with Shopify (navigating the admin, updating products, processing orders)

Solid understanding of e-commerce — you know what AOV, CLTV, ROAS, and conversion rate mean, and why they matter

Experience handling customer support with empathy and professionalism

Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (Klaviyo, Omnisend, Mailchimp, or similar)

Strong written English — your
s and messages sound natural, not robotic

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks without dropping the ball

Comfortable working independently and proactively flagging issues before they become problems



Nice to Have



Experience with helpdesk tools (Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk, or Tidio)

Basic graphic design skills (Canva) for social media posts or
 banners

Familiarity with
 Ads Manager or 
 Ads (even just reading dashboards)

Knowledge of direct response marketing and CRO principles

Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Leonardo AI)

Experience with project management tools (Trello, Asana, Notion, ClickUp)



Who You Are



You take ownership. If something is broken, you fix it or flag it — you don't wait to be told.

You communicate clearly and proactively. No disappearing acts.

You care about the customer experience as much as we do.

You see AI as your superpower, not a shortcut to do lazy work. You use it to produce more, faster, and better.

You're curious about marketing and e-commerce — you want to learn, not just execute tasks.



How to Apply

Please include in your application:



A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

Which e-commerce tools and platforms you've used (Shopify,
 tools, helpdesk, etc.)

Which AI tools do you use regularly, and give one concrete example of how AI helps you work faster or better in your daily tasks

Describe a time you turned an unhappy customer into a satisfied one — what happened and what did you do?

Your expected monthly salary in USD

Your available working hours (include your timezone)



We value attitude and reliability just as much as skills. If you're someone who shows up every day ready to work, uses AI to stay ahead, and genuinely cares about doing a great job, we want to hear from you.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Sales Development Representative (SDR)



Remote | Philippines | 8 AM – 4 PM CST



Help Build a Growing Commercial Division



Wash Masters is a fast-growing exterior cleaning company based in Minnesota, USA. We serve commercial properties, HOAs, property managers, and high-end clients.



We are expanding our commercial division and looking for a Sales Development Representative who enjoys creating new opportunities through consistent outbound outreach.



If you like clear expectations, organized systems, and seeing the results of your effort each day, this role will feel motivating.



The Role



Your mission is simple:



Create qualified commercial opportunities for our sales pipeline.



You help open doors so our sales team can close business.



This is a pre-sales role focused on outreach, follow-up, and maintaining a clean pipeline.



What You’ll Do



• Make outbound calls,
s, and send texts daily

• Complete 100 outreach actions per day

• Follow a structured multi-touch outreach process

• Log activity inside GoHighLevel CRM

The system guides the work.



What You’re Not Responsible For



• Building quotes

Your focus is outreach and qualification.



Schedule



Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 4:00 PM CST (US Central Time)

Weekly Targets



• 500 outreach actions

• 10–20 qualified opportunities

• Organized and up-to-date CRM records

Clear numbers. Clear scorecard.



Tools You’ll Use



• GoHighLevel (CRM)

• Slack

• Microsoft Teams

• Outlook

• Trainual (training platform)



We provide structured onboarding and documented processes so you can focus on executing.



A Strong Fit If You:



• Enjoy structured work and daily targets

• Communicate confidently in English

• Write clear and organized notes

• Stay consistent with follow-ups

• Take pride in organized systems

• Are comfortable with outbound calling



30 Days In



You confidently complete your daily outreach.



Your pipeline is organized and easy to review.



You understand the outreach rhythm and feel comfortable executing it independently.



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary based on experience.

Performance bonuses tied to qualified opportunities and pipeline performance.



How to Apply



To be considered, include:



A short introduction about your outbound sales experience



A voice recording explaining how you would respond to a prospect who says, “Maybe next year.”



Your internet speed (upload & download)



Confirmation you can work 8 AM – 4 PM CST



Subject line must be:

SDR – System Driven

 Ads experience (optional but helpful)

title: Web QA Tester & Lead Generation Scout (Base + High Commission)
description:
The Role:

We are a Canadian technology agency (JBE / 3lions) building high-speed web infrastructure. We are looking for a highly organized, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to act as our primary Quality Assurance tester and Lead Generation Scout.



This is a fast-paced role where you communicate directly with our Director via Slack/Email. You do not need to write code. You need to have an eagle eye for detail and a hustle mentality for finding good agency clients.



Priority 1: Quality Assurance (On-Demand)

When we build a new site or system, you are our first line of defense. You will review the work from an aesthetic and functionality perspective. Does it look great? Do the buttons work? You will document bugs and report them back to our team via Slack.



Priority 2: The Scout Mission (Daily)

Your primary daily mission is to hunt for high-value web development and AI consulting contracts on platforms like Upwork and Fiverr.



The Goal: Find 10 highly qualified job postings per platform, per day.



The Process: You find the job and send the exact posting to our Director via Slack. Our internal AI systems will generate the perfect proposal. You will then receive the proposal back and submit it to the client using a remote-desktop connection to our Canadian server.



Compensation Structure:

We want you to grow with our agency. We heavily reward success.



Part-Time Base Salary: $250 USD / month (for approx. 20 hours/week of QA and scouting).



Acceptance Bonus: $5 USD flat bonus for every proposal you scout that is accepted by the client.



Completion Commission: 5% of the total project value for every completed project you scouted. (Example: You scout a $2,000 web build, you get a $100 bonus upon completion).



Requirements:



Absolute fluency in written English.



High attention to visual detail for website QA testing.



Comfortable using Slack for rapid communication.



Comfortable using Remote Desktop software to access our secure Canadian workstations.



How to Apply:

We filter out applicants who do not read instructions. To prove you have read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase "Blue Horseshoe" and tell me what timezone you are located in.

title: Virtual Assistant – Sales Operations & Administrative Support
description:

The primary goal of this position is to ensure that sales opportunities are consistently updated, follow-ups are properly documented, and action items fro
etings are tracked through completion.



This is a process-driven role requiring consistency, follow-through, and strong documentation habits.

o A clear owner

o A projected value

• Join sales and internal meetings to:

o Capture action items

o Confirm ownership

o Track deadlines

o Ensure post-meeting follow-through

• Prepare weekly pipeline summaries and accountability reports

You will help ensure that the sales team operates with clear visibility and structured follow-up.



Secondary Responsibilities – Administrative Support:

• Organize meeting notes and internal documentation

• Assist with task coordination and internal follow-ups
