title: Full-Time SEO & WordPress Specialist -  Pet Health Supplements Company
description:
About Us

We're a small, family-run holistic pet supplement company that has been helping dogs live healthier lives for over 25 years. We specialize in herbal supplement programs for dogs with kidney, heart, and liver health issues.



We're good people looking for other good people. We treat our team with respect, we communicate openly, and we're looking for someone who wants to be a true member of the team long-term. SEO is a long game — we know that. We're not looking for quick fixes or someone who's going to disappear after a few months. We want someone who's reliable, takes pride in their work, and is excited to grow with us. If that sounds like you, keep reading.





We're now building an organic SEO presence using a specific, proven bottom-of-funnel SEO methodology. We have purchased a professional SEO course that lays out the entire strategy step by step, and we need someone to implement it.





The Role

This is not a "do whatever you think is best" SEO position. We have a detailed, step-by-step SEO course that serves as your training manual and playbook. Your first task will be to watch the entire course and understand the methodology before touching anything on the sites. After you've completed the course, we'd like you to map out your plan for what you think we should do based on what you learned. Then we'll go over it together, discuss tools and software, and get everything set up before work begins.





Tools & software you'll be working with (we provide all subscriptions and licenses):

Moz Pro  — keyword research, SERP analysis, On-Page Grader, rank tracking

Screaming Frog — site audits 

WordPress + WooCommerce with Elementor Pro — page building-landing pages

Yoast SEO or Rank Math — on-page SEO plugin (we'll d
 together after you've seen the course)

Google Search Console and Google Sheets

TinyPNG plugin — image compression

Redirection plugin — 301 redirects (or built-in with Rank Math)

Title and Nofollow for Links plugin

MozBar, SEO Meta in 1 Click, Detailed SEO Extension — browser extensions





Your day-to-day work will include:

Technical SEO & Site Audits — Running site audits to identify and fix technical issues (crawlability, page speed, indexing, sitemaps, robots.txt). Ensuring all sites meet technical SEO best practices before building new pages.





Keyword Research — Finding bottom-of-funnel keywords in the pet supplement and dog health niche. Manually analyzing search engine results pages (SERPs) to evaluate real competition — not just relying on difficulty scores. Building and maintaining a master keyword research spreadsheet. Identifying low-competition, high-intent keywords that larger competitors are overlooking.





Page Creation (This Is the Core of the Job) — Building bottom-of-funnel SEO landing pages on WordPress, 3-5 new pages per week. Following a specific on-page SEO structure for every page (keyword placement in URL, page title, meta description, H1, first sentence). Each page is roughly
words. Writing must sound natural and authentic — reflecting our brand voice and our founder's 25 years of expertise in herbal pet health. We're open to using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to help draft content, but the output must match our brand voice and read like a real person wrote it — not generic, not robotic. We'll provide brand voice guidelines and examples of our founder's writing style so you can get the tone right. Scoring and optimizing every page using the tools taught in the course. Submitting every new page to Google Search Console and tracking keyword rankings weekly.





Site Architecture & Internal Linking — Creating hub pages that organize landing pages by category. Managing internal linking so Google understands the site structure. Planning site layout using the course methodology.





Link Building — Submitting our sites to relevant directories (pet health, holistic supplements, natural pet care). Responding to expert quote requests from journalists on our founder's behalf (she has 25 years of expertise — perfect for this). Tracking all link building activity in a spreadsheet.





QA, Optimization & Reporting — Running the QA process taught in the course on every published page. Diagnosing and improving underperforming pages using the course's troubleshooting methodology. Keeping a change log for every modification made to any page. Providing a weekly update on what you worked on, what's published, what's in progress, and any issues or questions.





Site Migration (A Few Months In) — When our consolidated website is ready, you will manage the full migration: mapping old URLs to new URLs, setting up 301 redirects, submitting to Google Search Console, and monitoring rankings through the transition.





Required Skills & Experience

WordPress — comfortable building and managing WordPress sites

Page builder experience (Elementor, Divi, or similar)

SEO fundamentals — you understand on-page SEO, meta titles and descriptions, H1/H2 structure, URL optimization, internal linking, sitemaps

Experience with at least one SEO tool (Moz, Ahrefs, or Semrush)

Google Search Console

Google Sheets — formulas, data organization, filtering

Experience with an SEO plugin (Yoast or Rank Math)

Good English writing skills — you will be writing
word landing pages that need to read naturally and sound human

Detail-oriented and process-driven — this role is about following a proven system carefully, not improvising your own approach

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to help draft content, brainstorm keywords, check grammar, fact check and maintain a consistent brand voice. You don't need to be an expert, but you should be willing to learn if you aren't already using these tools



What We Provide

Access to the full SEO course (your training manual — you will watch this before starting any work)

All software subscriptions and plugin licenses listed above

Brand voice guidelines and writing examples so you can match our founder's tone

Direct communication with management

A collaborative, respectful working environment



What You Don't Need To Do

We have a separate tea
mber who handles video editing, video creation, and social media management. So you don't need to worry about any of that. If your SEO work creates opportunities for video content or social media posts, we'll coordinate between you and our social media tea
mber to get it done. Your focus stays on SEO and WordPress.



Schedule & Compensation

Full-time (40 hours/week), Monday to Friday

$500-$800/month depending on experience

Long-term position — we're building something here and we want you to be part of it for the long haul. The SEO course is phase one. As the strategy matures and results come in, we'll expand into broader SEO work together — things like schema markup, more advanced technical optimizations, and targeting more competitive keywords.



How to Apply



Please include in your application:

Your experience with WordPress and SEO — specific examples of sites you've worked on or results you've achieved



Which SEO tools you've used (Moz, Ahrefs, Semrush, or others)



Are you comfortable watching a full SEO course and following its methodology step by step, rather than doing things your own way?



Type your favourite dog breed at the very top of your application



We're looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and excited to learn a proven SEO system. If you have solid WordPress and SEO skills, you thrive when given a clear structure to follow, and you're looking for a team that treats you well and values long-term commitment, we want to hear from you.

, SMS, chat, and pipeline automation

title: VA Admin Agent
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link:

title: Generative AI Trainer
description:
We’re hiring a Generative AI Trainer to join our early-stage startup that's using artificial intelligence to help healthcare companies better understand and manage their contracts. This is a great opportunity to get into the world of AI while working closely with a team that values ownership, creative problem-solving, and building something from the ground up.



In this role, you’ll focus on analyzing and processing complex documentation and contracts, working hand-in-hand with our operations and product teams to ensure our AI models are learning and improving every day. It’s a detail-heavy, highly organized role—perfect for someone who loves working with documentation, thrives in a structured environment, and enjoys being part of a fast-moving startup.



This is an internal, non-voice operations role, ideal for someone who prefers deep focus work and collaboration through written communication.



If you’re passionate about startups, tech, and staying organized, and you get a thrill out of seeing things work better because of your input, this one’s for you.



Responsibilities:

- Analyze, review, and process healthcare contracts and documents using internal tools powered by AI models.

- Develop systems and workflows to improve how contracts are handled, stored, and made accessible to customers.

- Ensure data accuracy, organization, and consistency across tools and platforms used by the AI and operations teams.

- Collaborate daily with operations and product teams to evaluate AI output and provide feedback for ongoing model  improvements.

- Act as a thought partner to help shape how the AI is fine-tuned and trained over time.

- Continuously develop your skills and understanding of both the AI model and the product, contributing to its evolution as the company scales.



Requirements:

- 5+ years of experience in BPO Customer Support, Operations, or Documentation Management, especially with US-based businesses.

- Any US-based healthcare experience (familiarity with medical or insurance terminology, systems, tools, or processes) is a really big plus!

- Experience working at a US-based startup is a major plus!

- 2+ years working from home with consistent productivity and communication.

- Experience as a Team Lead or Subject Matter Expert is a plus.

- Typing speed of 75 WPM or higher preferred.

- Regular user of AI tools (ChatGPT, Notion AI, etc.) with curiosity about how they work and improve.

- Extremely detail-oriented with an almost obsessive knack for organizing documents, workflows, and data.

- Naturally inquisitive and comfortable asking lots of questions to understand how things work.

- Fast learner who takes feedback well and enjoys iterating toward improvement.

- Strong written communication and collaboration skills—most of your work will be async or via chat.

- Proficient in English and confident navigating various SaaS tools in a remote, fast-paced setting.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55k PHP per month.

- Paid Time Off + Paid Holidays.

- 100% WFH.

- Flexible work arrangements and supportive team environment.



When applying, please attach your CV and please tell us about your favorite AI tools and how you’ve used AI in a past role. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: rec8LYyhS9JRHsFJh into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job rec8LYyhS9JRHsFJh!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Remote Commission-Based Sales Development Representative — AI Automation Agency (Canada)
description:
# TruBuilt AI — Commission Sales Representative

**Job Posting — OnlineJobs.ph**



---



## JOB TITLE

Remote Commission-Based Sales Development Representative — AI Automation Agency (Canada)



---



## ABOUT TRUBUILT AI

TruBuilt AI is a Canadian AI automation agency helping contractors, trades businesses, dental offices, and chiropractors automate their lead generation and follow-up systems. We build done-for-you workflows that find qualified leads, reach out automatically, and fill our clients' pipelines — without them lifting a finger.



We are growing fast and looking for a driven, personable sales representative to help us book discovery calls with business owners across Canada.



---



## THE ROLE

This is a **commission-based, remote** sales position. Your primary job is to call Canadian business owners, introduce TruBuilt AI's services, and book 20-minute discovery/demo calls for our Founder.



You will be provided with:

- A proven, tested call script

- A lead list of targeted prospects

- Full training on our services and workflow

- Ongoing support and coaching



This role is perfect for someone who is hungry, self-motivated, and wants unlimited earning potential based on their own effort.



---



## WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Make outbound calls to Canadian business owners (contractors, electricians, dental offices, chiropractors, landscapers)

- Follow a provided script — warm, conversational, not aggressive

- Book 20-minute discovery/demo calls on behalf of the Founder

- Log all call activity and outcomes in our CRM (HubSpot)

- Provide daily call summaries and feedback on common objections

- Communicate professionally via
 and messaging tools



---



## COMPENSATION

- **$150 USD commission per closed/signed client** (Founder closes all deals on demo calls)

- Future structure being developed: **bonus per booked demo** once revenue targets are met

- Unlimited earning potential — the more you book, the more you earn

- Example: 4 closed clients per month = $600 USD/month on top of any base consideration



---



## REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE

- **Excellent spoken English** — clear, professional, and confident on the phone

- **Previous call center, sales, or SDR experience** — minimum 1 year

- **Strong technical computer knowledge** — comfortable with CRMs, automation tools, AI-driven software

- **Familiarity with AI and automation concepts** — you don't need to build workflows but you must understand and speak confidently about what automation does for businesses

- **Reliable internet connection and quality headset/microphone**

- **Self-motivated and results-driven** — this is commission based, your income reflects your effort

- **Available during Canadian business hours** — primarily 9am-5pm CST (11pm-7am PHT) OR flexible morning PHT hours



---



## NICE TO HAVE

- Experience selling SaaS, tech, or digital marketing services

- Familiarity with n8n, HubSpot, or similar tools

- Experience calling Canadian or North American businesses specifically



---



## WHAT MAKES THIS OPPORTUNITY GREAT

- Work fully remote from home

- Flexible schedule within Canadian business hours

- Be part of a fast-growing AI company at ground level

- Direct access to the Founder — you're not a number here

- As the company scales, so does your compensation

- Ground floor opportunity — top performers will be considered for expanded roles



---



## HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following to 
 with subject line **"SDR Application — [Your Name]"**:



1. A **voice recording** (60-90 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you're a great fit — this is mandatory, applications without voice recordings will not be considered

2. Your **resume or work history** — especially any sales or call center experience

3. A brief answer to this question: **"How would you explain AI automation to a plumber who has never heard of it?"**



---



## A NOTE FROM THE FOUNDER

*"I'm looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates honestly, and wants to grow with a company that's going somewhere. If you're the kind of person who shows up every day, follows through, and genuinely enjoys talking to people — we're going to get along great. This is a ground floor opportunity and I intend to reward the right person well as we grow."*



— Greg Bates, Founder | TruBuilt AI

title: Virtual Assistant – Naturopathic Medical Practice
description:
Virtual Assistant – Naturopathic Medical Practice



Part-Time | Monday to Friday, 12:00 pm – 4:00 pm Pacific Time | Remote



Seeking virtual assistant for a small Naturopathic Medicine practice with three physicians looking for a reliable and organized person to join the team. You will be the front-line voice of the practice, supporting all three doctors by answering and returning patient calls, handling administrative tasks, and managing day-to-day work in our EHR system.

This is a dedicated role that requires your full attention during working hours. The pace is steady and the responsibilities are real, so this position is not suited for someone juggling other jobs at the same time.

All patient-facing interactions are non-clinical in nature. Any medical questions that come up are promptly referred to the appropriate provider on staff.



What You'll Be Doing

Answering inbound patient calls and returning calls professionally and promptly

Providing administrative support across three physicians

Managing scheduling and related tasks in Charm EHR

Documenting all interactions accurately and promptly in the EHR

Maintaining strict HIPAA compliance and patient confidentiality at all times

Adapting quickly to new workflows or policy changes as they arise

Collaborating with the team of doctors and staff

 

What We're Looking For

Minimum 2 years of experience in a medical call or administrative role, with clinic, hospital, or provider-side experience preferred

Experience with Charm EHR or a comparable system required

Excellent English communication skills with a neutral accent, as you will be speaking regularly with U.S.-based patients

Strong empathy, patience, and the ability to de-escalate situations calmly and professionally

Highly organized, with the ability to manage work smoothly across three different physicians

Adaptable and dependable when processes or policies change

HIPAA certification required — provided as paid training during onboarding



Technical & Workspace Requirements

Strong, stable internet required: Minimum 50 Mbps download and 20 Mbps upload

A reliable backup internet connection is required — mobile phone hotspots are not accepted; dedicated wireless dongles or a secondary broadband connection are acceptable

Stable power backup required

Quiet, private, professional workspace suitable for voice work

No one else may have visibility to your screen or physical access to your computer

Noise-canceling headset and a dependable computer required



If you take pride in keeping things running smoothly behind the scenes and genuinely enjoy supporting a healthcare team that cares about its patients, we would love to hear from you.



To apply, please use this link:

description:

About the Role



We’re looking for an experienced Google Ads Specialist with a passion for driving growth in e-commerce. Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities.



Optimize campaign performance through data analysis, A/B testing, and continuous improvement.

Collaborate with design and content teams to create high-converting ad copy, creatives, and landing pages.

Strong analytical skills and experience with conversion tracking, pixel setup, and attribution models.

Experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, or other e-commerce and marketing automation tools is a plus.

Google Ads Certification preferred.

title: Ecom Performance Video Editor | High-Growth | Long-Term
description:
## Role Overview



The purpose of the Video Editor role at Ivy Ecommerce is to transform creative briefs into high-performing video ads that drive conversions at scale.



This is not just a technical editing role.



Our Video Editors are an integral part of the marketing engine. Your job is to understand the psychology, messaging, and strategy behind each ad concept, and bring it to life through sharp editing, pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the execution and final polish of our video ads. The success of our marketing team depends on your ability to:



- Understand each creative brief from a performance/direct-response marketing lens

- Assemble visuals, hooks, captions, and pacing in a way that maximizes conversions

- Enhance the core marketing message through smart creative decisions



You understand that small details can be the difference between an ad that gets scaled to millions in spend and one that dies after testing.



Your role is to work closely with our Creative Strategists, actively learn what makes ads win or lose, and help us consistently produce winning ads month over month across our brand portfolio.





### Primary Responsibilities



- Edit and deliver ~10 ad briefs per week

- Collaborate closely with Creative Strategists to ensure each ad concept is executed correctly

- Implement feedback from the creative team and performance data to improve iterations

- Learn and internalize our ad strategy frameworks to understand what makes creatives “win” or “lose”

- Analyze your own creatives to identify what’s working, what isn’t, and how to improve

- Upload and organize final assets into the correct folders and formats for each platform





## Qualifications



### Direct Experience



- 1+ year experience editing eCommerce / performance marketing ads

- Experience working within a team environment and understanding roles in a creative workflow





### Character Traits We Look For



- Extremely high attention to detail – you care about the small things because you know they matter

- Creative + marketing-minded – you’re not just an editor, you’re curious about why ads perform

- Strong visual communicator and storyteller

- High curiosity and a desire to continuously improve your creative and marketing skills

- Willingness to do the “boring but important” work consistently at a high standard

- Clear communicator who collaborates well with a team

- Time-efficient, but willing to put in extra effort when quality demands it

- Hungry, motivated, and growth-oriented – you want to get better, take on more responsibility, and level up your career

- to make sure you are still reading, type “BLUE” in your response title.

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Not a clock-in, clock-out mindset — you care about results and impact







### This Role Is NOT for You If:



- You only want to execute tasks without understanding the marketing behind them

- You’re not interested in learning performance marketing or creative strategy

- You dislike feedback or fast-paced environments

- You’re disorganized or unreliable

- You prefer working solo and don’t enjoy team collaboration

- You’re not motivated to grow your skills and career over time







### Growth & Upside



At Ivy Ecommerce, we invest in people who perform and show initiative. This role has real upside for those who take ownership:



- Opportunity to grow into a Creative Strategist / Creative Lead role over time

- Increased responsibility across multiple brands in our portfolio

- Performance-based bonuses tied to ad spend (no cap)

- Long-term growth path into higher-level marketing and creative leadership roles



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in performance marketing, creative & be part of building cool ecom brands, not just edit videos.







## ???? How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with:



- A short overview of yourself

- Your CV / Resume with your past work experience

- Your eCommerce video editing portfolio

- Your
 address + WhatsApp number



Then answer the questions below in detail:



1. What about this role excites you most?

2. Why do you believe you’re a strong fit for this role?







Applications that do not follow these instructions or provide detailed answers will not be reviewed.

title: Accountant (Multi-Entity)
description:
Role Purpose

To manage the daily accounting function across multiple TBD entities, ensuring invoices are processed, payments are collected, accounts are reconciled, and financial statements are prepared accurately and on time.

The Arrangement

This is a results-based engagement, not an hours-based one. The work needs to be completed each morning once Xero has updated overnight. As long as the work is done and I can see results, the exact timing within the morning window is flexible.

•Service window: 8:00am - 10:00am AEST (approximate)

•Flexibility within that window based on workload

•What matters: work is complete, accurate, and I can see the results

•No micromanagement of hours if outcomes are delivered



Primary Values



Highest Standards : Every figure is correct. Every reconciliation balances. Every statement is accurate. No sloppy work, no assumptions, no 'it's probably right'.



Ownership: You own the numbers. If something doesn't balance, you find out why. If a payment is missing, you chase it. You don't wait to be told there's a problem.



Deliver Results:  The work gets done every morning. Reports are ready when needed. Queries are resolved, not parked. Outcomes matter more than hours logged.





1 Accounts Receivable Generate and send all client invoices across multiple entities via Xero. Ensure accuracy of amounts, services, and client details. Chase overdue payments.

2 Accounts Payable Process supplier invoices, verify against purchase orders or approvals, schedule payments, and maintain accurate creditor records.

3 Debt Collection Actively chase outstanding debts. Request and follow up on statements. Resolve queries promptly. Escalate aged debt as per agreed thresholds.

4 Bank Reconciliation Reconcile all bank accounts daily once Xero updates. Identify and resolve discrepancies. No unmatched transactions left unaddressed.

5 Multi-Entity Management Manage accounts across Australian and UAE entities. Maintain clean separation between entities. Ensure intercompany transactions are properly recorded.

6 Statement Requests Request statements from suppliers and debtors as needed. Confirm balances. Identify and resolve any discrepancies between records.

7 Query Resolution Respond to and resolve queries from clients, suppliers, and internal stakeholders. Don't let queries sit. Own them until resolved.

8 Financial Statements Prepare monthly Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet for each entity. Ensure statements are accurate, complete, and delivered by agreed deadlines.

9 Month-End Close Complete month-end close procedures. Ensure all transactions are posted, accruals are recorded, and accounts are ready for reporting.



Requirements

Essential

•Strong Xero experience (this is non-negotiable)

•Experience managing accounts for multiple entities

•Ability to prepare financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

•Experience with accounts receivable, accounts payable, and bank reconciliation

•Comfortable chasing payments and resolving queries professionally

•Reliable internet and quiet workspace

•Available within the 8:00am - 10:00am AEST service window

Desirable

•Accounting qualification (CPA, CA, or equivalent)

•Experience with Australian accounting standards (UAE experience a plus)

•Experience in a services or professional services business

What Success Looks Like

•Bank accounts reconciled daily, no unexplained items

•Invoices sent on time and accurately

•Debts chased proactively, not aged silently

•Queries resolved, not parked

•Financial statements ready when needed, accurate and complete

•I can see results each morning without having to ask

•Problems flagged early, not discovered later

The Non-Negotiables

•Accuracy is everything. If you're not sure, check. If you can't check, ask.

•Don't let things age silently. If a debt is overdue, chase it. If a query is unresolved, resolve it.

•Own your numbers. If something doesn't balance, it's your job to find out why.

•Communicate proactively. If there's a problem, I should hear it from you first.

•Results matter more than hours. Get the work done right, and the flexibility works both ways.

title: Amazon Private Label and PPC Specialist
description:
About the role

We are an Australian owned business with a UK based private label brand on Amazon.

You will be managing a UK marketplace private label brand for an Australian client.

We are looking for an experienced Amazon specialist in the Philippines to manage our advertising campaigns, support A plus content, and stay on top of performance every week. You will work closely with our creative team to brief and improve images and video so the brand stays competitive and profitable.



Key responsibilities

1. Campaign and ad management

Set up, manage, and optimise Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns.

Monitor Amazon Ads and Ad Console several times per week within your agreed hours.

Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to reach ACOS and TACOS targets.

Manage keyword research, search term reports, and negative keywords.

Run regular tests on creatives, headlines, and placements.

2. Private label brand management

Work only on our private label listings, not arbitrage or wholesale.

Review competitor listings, pricing, and offers on the UK marketplace.

Suggest changes to offers, pricing, and promotions based on data.

Coordinate with the team on review strategy and listing quality.

3. A plus content and listings

Review current listings and A plus content for clarity, keyword coverage, and conversion.

Brief the creative team on images, infographics, comparison charts, and brand story modules.

Check uploads on Amazon once the creative team delivers the assets.

Suggest ongoing improvements based on performance data.

4. Creative and video ads

Plan what image and video assets are needed for ads and product detail pages.

Provide clear briefs to designers and video editors with examples and references.

Review final assets before upload and confirm they meet Amazon guidelines.

Monitor performance of video ads and propose changes when needed.

5. Reporting and optimisation

Prepare a short weekly performance summary with key numbers, including ACOS, TACOS, ad spend, sales, best and worst performers, and search terms.

Flag any issues early, including sudden drops in performance or policy warnings.

Keep simple dashboards or spreadsheets up to date.



Skills and experience

Strong experience managing Amazon Ads for private label brands, with at least one year of hands on experience in Amazon PPC and Ad Console.

Confident in managing Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Confident in keyword research and search term analysis.

Experience with bid and budget optimisation and negative keyword strategy.

Good understanding of listing optimisation, including titles, bullet points, images, and A plus content.

Experience working with a creative team and giving clear, structured briefs.

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for basic reports and analysis.

Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Data Dive, or similar.

Strong English reading and writing skills, with a focus on UK marketplace wording.

Personal qualities

Proactive and organised, always aware of campaign performance.

Detail focused, especially with numbers, bids, and budgets.

Comfortable working independently with light supervision.

Clear and direct communicator, able to explain needs and findings to the creative and leadership team.

Strong sense of ownership for results and ad spend.



Hours and working pattern

Approximately 3 to 5 hours per week to start.

Flexible schedule, as long as agreed weekly tasks and reporting are completed on time.

Potential for more hours as the brand grows and results improve.

Benefits

Work from home, long term role for the right person.

Stable client based in Australia with growth plans in the UK marketplace.

Opportunity to grow hours and responsibilities over time.

The Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, high-energy Junior Loan Processor to join our team. You will be the engine of our pre-approval process, ensuring that files are clean, calculations are accurate, and clients feel supported from the 
nt they start their home-buying journey.



Your Responsibilities

Front-End Documentation: Collect and review initial docs (credit, assets, etc.) for pre-approvals.



Income Calculation: Perform accurate calculations for various income types (W2, Self-Employed, etc.).



Client Management: Consistent, professional follow-up with clients to gather missing items.



Pricing & Numbers: Prepare detailed fee sheets and "know the numbers" scenarios for clients when they find a home.



DPA Research: Conduct thorough research on Down Payment Assistance programs to find the best fit for our borrowers.



Workflow Management: Maintain all files and milestones within the Arive platform.



Requirements

Experience: At least 2 years of mortgage processing or junior processing experience.



Technical: Must be proficient in Arive.



Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills (you will be client-facing).



Research Skills: Ability to navigate complex DPA guidelines.



Reliability: Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace for US business hours.



Compensation & Market Rates

For a processor in the Philippines with 2+ years of experience and specific knowledge of Arive (which is a niche, sought-after skill), you should expect to pay a premium above general VA rates.

title: Shopify Store Builder – E-Commerce & Direct Response Specialist
description:
Shopify Store Builder – E-Commerce & Direct Response Specialist

About the Role

We're looking for a skilled Shopify specialist to join our team on a long-term basis. You'll be responsible for building and launching approximately one complete Shopify store per week. This is not about "pretty" designs — we need stores that convert, built with a direct response mindset and strong e-commerce fundamentals.

What You'll Do



Build complete Shopify stores from scratch (theme setup, product pages, collections, navigation, checkout optimization)

Create high-converting product pages using direct response copywriting principles (headlines, offers, urgency, social proof, risk reversal)

Implement CRO best practices: above-the-fold optimization, trust elements, upsells, cross-sells, cart optimization

Install and configure essential apps (reviews, upsells,
 capture, analytics/tracking)

Ensure mobile responsiveness and fast page load speeds

Set up payment gateways, shipping settings, and store policies

Deliver approximately 1 fully functional store per week, ready to receive traffic



Requirements



- Proven experience building Shopify stores (please share live store examples or screenshots)

- Strong understanding of e-commerce and what makes people buy online

- Knowledge of CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) — you understand heatmaps, A/B testing logic, and conversion funnels

- Familiarity with direct response marketing principles (you know who people like Russell Brunson, Eugene Schwartz, or Gary Halbert are — and you apply their thinking to store design)

- Ability to work independently and deliver on deadline without micromanagement

- Attention to detail — stores must be polished, professional, and error-free before delivery

- Good written English communication

- You use AI on your workflow



Nice to Have



Experience with Shopify Liquid for minor theme customizations

Knowledge of
 Ads / TikTok Ads landing page best practices

Experience with GemPages, PageFly, or similar page builders

Familiarity with
 marketing tools (Klaviyo, Omnisend)



How to Apply

Please include in your application:



- A brief introduction about yourself

- Links to 2-3 Shopify stores you've built (or screenshots if the stores are no longer live)

- Describe one specific CRO or direct response technique you always implement on product pages, and why

- Your expected monthly salary in USD



We're looking for someone reliable, skilled, and excited about building stores that actually sell — not just look good. If that's you, we'd love to hear from yo

title: WooCommerce Product & Inventory Specialist (Detail-Oriented, Long-Term Role)
description:
WooCommerce Product & Inventory Specialist (WordPress + JetEngine)



About Us



We are a growing trailer dealership based in (USA) with a strong reputation for customer service and product expertise. We are building a modern e-commerce system using WordPress and WooCommerce and need a detail-oriented tea
mber to help manage and improve our product listings and inventory accuracy.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who takes pride in clean, accurate work and wants to grow with a business.



Your Role



You will be responsible for building, editing, and maintaining product listings inside WordPress/WooCommerce, ensuring all product data is accurate, consistent, and optimized.



This is not just data entry — this role requires:



Attention to detail



Ability to verify information



Structured thinking



Consistency across hundreds of products



Our System (Important)



We use the following tools:



WordPress + WooCommerce



Elementor



JetEngine (custom fields / meta boxes)



JetFilters (site filtering)



ATUM (inventory management)



Google Sheets (source data)



Products are created from:

Manufacturer Invoices ? Spreadsheet ? WordPress Product Listing



Core Responsibilities

1. Product Listing Creation & Editing



Create and update WooCommerce product listings



Input clean, structured product data (not one long description)



Use JetEngine fields correctly (specifications, features, dimensions, etc.)



Ensure formatting is consistent across all listings



2. Inventory & Stock Management



Set correct Stock Status + Quantity



Understand different statuses (in stock, incoming, order-only, etc.)



Ensure products display correctly on the website and feeds



3. Product Data Accuracy



Cross-check all product details with:



Manufacturer websites



Spec sheets



Internal data



Fix incorrect measurements, options, or specs



4. Product Attributes & Filters



Maintain clean and consistent attributes:



Length



Width



Type



Category



This directly affects website filters and search functionality



5. Ongoing Cleanup & Optimization



Identify errors or inconsistencies



Suggest improvements to product structure



Help us build a more scalable system



What We Are Looking For

Required Experience



WooCommerce product management



WordPress backend experience



Experience working with product catalogs (100+ products)



Strong attention to detail



Highly Preferred



Experience with JetEngine or custom fields



Experience cleaning up messy product data



Understanding of product attributes and filtering systems



Basic SEO knowledge (titles, meta, structure)



This Role Is NOT a Fit If You:



Rush through tasks



Miss small details



Need constant supervision



Do not verify information



Prefer creative work over structured, repeatable systems



This Role IS a Fit If You:



Like working with systems and structure



Take pride in accuracy



Catch mistakes others miss



Enjoy organizing messy data



Want long-term, steady work



Compensation



Based on experience



Trial task will be paid



Opportunity for long-term role with increasing responsibility



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



To apply, include:



A short summary of your WooCommerce experience



Example of product listings you’ve worked on



Answer this question:



If a product has incorrect size, missing attributes, and wrong stock status, what steps would you take to fix it?



Include the word “TRAILER” at the top of your application so we know you read this



Trial Task



Qualified applicants will be given a paid test task:



Review a product



Identify issues



Recommend corrections



(Optional) Make updates in WordPress

title: Lease Administrator
description:

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Lease Administrator to support our leasing and property management operations.

Lease administration

Compensation (Philippines-Based)

Description of your experience with leases or property management



Example of any lease abstraction or similar work (if available)

This is a part-time, remote role (3–4 hours/day) designed for someone who thrives on structure, detail, and helping creative professionals execute efficiently.

You’ll play a key role in keeping marketing initiatives on track, maintaining client pipelines, and supporting marketing efforts—essentially acting as a reliable operational counterpart to a fast-moving, creative founder who moves quickly across creative and strategic projects. The ideal assistant is someone who anticipates next steps, keeps track of ongoing tasks, and ensures deadlines are met—effectively acting as an operational “co-pilot.”





Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Client Outreach

* Maintain and update sales and prospect lists

* Track down client
s and contact information

* Assist with outreach campaigns for
 and LinkedIn

Project Coordination & Administrative Support

s

 platforms.  Experience with 
 is a plus

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys bringing clarity to complex workflows and helping a creative founder maintain 
ntum without dropping important details.



Why This Role is Important?We’re looking for someone to handle tasks that free up the founder’s attention for creativity and strategic work, including project follow-up, list maintenance, research, proposals, and social media management. You’ll be a critical part of keeping the business organized, efficient, and on track.



Hours & Location

* Remote / virtual

* Part-time: 3–4 hours/day

* Flexible scheduling





Apply If You:

* Enjoy supporting creative professionals by keeping workflows organized

* Take satisfaction in completing detail-oriented tasks with clarity and efficiency

title: Senior Creative Strategist — Facebook/Meta Ads (E-commerce)
description:
Job Title: Senior Creative Strategist —
/Meta Ads (E-commerce)







Job Type: Full-time / Part-time



Ideally full time 



About the Role



We're looking for an experienced creative strategist who makes ads that scale profitably on Meta. Not boosted posts. Not organic content. Direct response ads that spend real money and generate sales.



You'll research customers, develop angles and hooks, write scripts and briefs, and build creative testing roadmaps. You are NOT editing videos or running the ad account — you're the strategist behind winning ads.



We have 2 video editors and 1 Graphic designer for static ads. They are both amazing.



This role requires proven experience. If you've never worked on ads spending $500+/day, please do not apply.



This role has HUGE winning ad bonuses. Every winning creative you make, You will get a % of ad spend. 





---



Requirements



- Minimum 2 years experience in creative strategy for paid Meta ads

- Have worked on e-commerce brands (Shopify, DTC) — not lead gen, not local business

- Can show specific ads you strategized and their performance (spend, ROAS, results)

- Strong understanding of hooks, angles, offers, and why ads convert

- Able to write creative briefs that UGC creators and editors can execute

- Excellent written English



---



Big Plus



- Helped scale a brand from low spend to $50K-$100K+ per month

- BIGGG + if you have worked with any first to market product. Or brands with very little direct competitors

- Experience working with a performance marketing agency

- Understand creative testing frameworks (concept testing, iterations, 3-2-2 method)

- Familiar with ad spy tools (Foreplay, AdSpy, Atria Meta Ad Library)

_ familiar with AI ads, we can teach as well, But ideally very experienced with AI UGC ads



---



**Do NOT Apply If:**



- Your only experience is organic social media or content creation

- You've never worked on ads spending more than $500/day

- You cannot provide examples of ads you personally strategized

- You're looking for a "virtual assistant" role — this is specialist work



---



To Apply



Send a message with:

1. Short intro — your experience with paid ads creative strategy

2. 2-3 examples of ads you strategized (screenshots, links, or videos) with results

3. Full Portfolio/ Case studies

4. Your expected monthly salary in PHP or USD



No examples = no interview. I respect your time, please respect mine.

title: Outbound Sales Representative – Appointment Setter (US Market | Performance-Based Role)
description:
About the Role



Wash Masters is hiring a Sales Development Representative to help grow our commercial division in the United States.



This role focuses on outbound sales activity and appointment setting.



You will be responsible for reaching out to potential clients, creating opportunities, and supporting our sales pipeline through consistent daily effort.



?



About Wash Masters



We are a growing exterior cleaning company based in Minnesota, USA.



We serve commercial properties, property managers, and high-end clients.



Our team operates with clear systems, strong communication, and a focus on measurable results.



?



What You Will Do

 • Perform 100 outbound actions per day (calls,
s, SMS)

 • Contact commercial prospects in the U.S.

 • Set qualified appointments for the sales team

 • Track all activity in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

 • Maintain a clear next step for every lead



?



Work Expectations



This role is structured and performance-based.



You will succeed in this position if you are:

 • Consistent with daily activity

 • Comfortable making outbound calls

 • Organized with systems and tracking

 • Focused on improving your results over time



We provide clear expectations so you always know what success looks like.



?



Compensation

 • Base Pay: $700/month

 • Performance Pay: $30 per qualified appointment



Performance Bonuses:

 • 15+ appointments/month ? +$100

 • 25+ appointments/month ? +$250



Typical earnings for strong performers:

$900 – $1,200+ per month



?



Qualified Appointment Requirements



To earn performance pay, the following must be completed:

 • Decision maker identified

 • Service need confirmed

 • Scope understood

 • Timeline discussed

 • Appointment scheduled

 • Accepted into intake



This ensures the opportunities created are valuable and actionable.



?



Schedule

 • Monday to Friday

 • 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM CST (US time)



?



Who This Role Is Best For

 • Candidates who enjoy outbound sales work

 • Individuals who are comfortable speaking with new people daily

 • Those who prefer clear expectations and structured systems

 • Professionals who want to grow based on performance



?



Important Note



This role requires consistent outbound activity and daily tracking.



If you are looking for a purely administrative or non-calling role, this position will not be a fit.



?



How to Apply



Please submit all of the following:

 1. 6–10 bullet explanation of your outbound sales process

 2. A sample call opener to a property manager

 3. A follow-up
 example

 4. A 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself

 5. Confirmation you can meet:

 • 100 outbound actions per day

 • Full CST schedule



Applications that do not include all items will not be reviewed.

Facilitate strong communication across tea
mbers and stakeholders



Potentially join client calls and represent the business professionally

title: Shopify Manager + Graphic Designer | Premium Lifestyle Brand (Full-Time)
description:
WHO WE ARE

MOTO NÖZ is a premium lifestyle brand rooted in vintage motocross culture. Our tagline is "Nostalgia in Motion." We sell limited-edition apparel drops (tees, hoodies, windbreakers, headwear, and accessories) through Shopify with fulfillment handled via Printify (print-on-demand).

We are a small founding team based in California, currently launching our first collection. We move fast, we care deeply about quality and brand integrity, and we need someone who can grow with us from day one.

This is not a faceless corporate gig. You will be a core part of a brand that is building something real.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS

You will wear two main hats, with a third hat growing over time:



Hat 1: Shopify + Printify Operations Manager (Primary)

You will own the backend of our e-commerce business. This means:



Managing our Shopify store daily: product listings, variant management, SKU accuracy, inventory settings, pricing updates

Ensuring the Shopify-to-Printify integration runs smoothly (syncing products, checking fulfillment status, troubleshooting order issues)

Cleaning up operational inefficiencies in our current store setup and keeping it optimized going forward

Handling product listing updates and new SKU uploads as we release new drops

Managing customer service messages (order inquiries, shipping questions, returns)

Supporting abandoned cart recovery, discount code setup, and basic store maintenance

Running test orders before launches and ensuring the checkout experience is flawless



You should already know your way around Shopify's admin panel, bulk editor, and product/variant structure. If you have also worked with Printify or another POD provider, that is a significant advantage.



Hat 2: Graphic Designer (Primary)

We use AI tools to generate initial design concepts. Your job is to take those AI-generated images and turn them into real, production-ready design files. This includes:



Extracting designs from AI-generated mockup images and recreating or refining them as clean, layered design files

Preparing print-ready files for Printify upload (correct dimensions, DPI, transparent backgrounds, color profiles)

Creating social media graphics, promotional banners, and marketing assets that match our brand aesthetic

Maintaining visual consistency across all brand touchpoints (warm, airy, vintage California feel -- think Kodak Portra 400 film tones, not dark and moody)

Light photo editing and mockup creation as needed



You must be proficient in Canva at minimum. Experience with Adobe Illustrator and/or Photoshop is a strong plus and will put you ahead of other applicants. If you can vector trace, that matters here.



Hat 3: Marketing Support (Growing Over Time)

As the brand scales, you will play a bigger role in marketing execution:



Scheduling and posting content on Instagram (our primary platform)

Assisting with
 marketing campaigns

Supporting content calendar execution alongside our Marketing Director

SEO awareness for product descriptions and blog content



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Must-have:



Proven experience managing a Shopify store (not just "familiar with" -- you have actually managed one)

Graphic design skills with the ability to produce clean, print-ready files from reference images

Proficiency in Canva; bonus points for Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or Figma

Strong written English (you will handle customer messages and contribute to product copy)

Reliable internet connection and a professional work setup

Available full-time, 40 hours per week

Detail-oriented and organized -- we are a brand that cares about precision



Nice-to-have:



Experience with Printify or other print-on-demand platforms

Familiarity with social media marketing (especially Instagram)

 marketing experience

Experience working with lifestyle, streetwear, or fashion brands

Understanding of SKU systems and product variant management

Knowledge of SEO for e-commerce





WHAT YOU GET



$6/hr USD, full-time (40 hours/week), paid biweekly

A real seat at the table in a brand that is building from the ground up

Room to grow your role and responsibilities as the brand scales

A team that respects your expertise and gives you ownership of your work

A product and brand you can be proud of





HOW TO APPLY

Include the word "DesignTime" in your application headline/subject line. Then tell us:



A brief summary of your Shopify management experience (which stores, how long, what you managed)

A brief summary of your design experience and which tools you use

Links to 2-3 examples of your design work (portfolio, Behance, Google Drive folder, or screenshots are all fine)

Your availability to start

Any experience with Printify, POD fulfillment, or marketing (if applicable)



Applications missing "DesignTime" in the subject line will not be reviewed.

title: SEO Manager
description:
SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist

Molecular Biology Products Inc. (MBP)?Remote | Full-Time or Part-Time

Molecular Biology Products Inc. (MBP) is a growing North American supplier of molecular biology reagents and lab consumables serving academic, biotech, and pharmaceutical laboratories. We help research teams reduce cost per reaction through strategic sourcing and high-quality alternatives to major brands.

We are seeking a results-driven SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to increase MBP’s online visibility, generate qualified inbound leads, and position MBP as a trusted supplier in the life sciences market.



Role Overview

This role focuses on improving MBP’s search rankings, website traffic, and inbound lead generation through SEO, content, and digital marketing strategy. You will optimize our website (
), build search authority for key product categories (PCR consumables, reagents, cell lines, etc.), and drive measurable growth in organic traffic and conversions.

If you are analytical, creative, and experienced in SEO and B2B digital marketing, this role offers strong impact and growth potential.



Key Responsibilities

* Develop and execute MBP’s SEO strategy (technical, on-page, and off-page)

* Perform keyword research for molecular biology and lab supply products

* Optimize product pages, category pages, and technical SEO structure

* Create and manage SEO-driven content (blogs, guides, landing pages)

* Improve website conversions and inbound lead flow

* Manage backlink outreach and authority building

* Track performance using Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEO tools

* Provide monthly reporting on traffic, rankings, and leads



Ideal Candidate

* Proven experience in SEO and digital marketing (B2B preferred)

* Strong understanding of technical SEO and on-page optimization

* Experience with e-commerce or product-based websites

* Data-driven and results-oriented mindset

* Excellent written English

* Familiarity with life sciences, biotech, or technical industries is a plus

* Experience with Shopify, WordPress, or similar CMS preferred



Compensation

* Competitive base pay (hourly or salary depending on experience)

* Performance bonuses tied to traffic and lead growth

* Long-term growth opportunity within MBP



Why Join MBP

* Work in the growing biotech and life sciences sector

* Direct impact on company growth and visibility

* Large product catalog with strong SEO potential

* Collaborative and entrepreneurial environment

* Opportunity to scale MBP’s global digital presence



Application Instructions

To apply, please send:

1. Resume

2. Brief Intro

 applications to:

title: Video Editor (DTC eCommerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply :

We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who is genuinely obsessed with efficiency and continuous improvement. This is not a role for someone who just wants to maintain the status quo or follow a manual. You will be responsible for building and scaling our support operations. We want someone who takes deep pride in ownership, turns chaos into systems, and ensures our customer experience is a competitive advantage. If you are a builder who thrives on fixing broken workflows and implementing high-level strategy, we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do



* Optimize & Implement: You will be the architect of our CS roadmap, constantly auditing and improving systems to ensure we stay ahead of our growth.

* System Ownership: Beyond just managing tickets, you will create, improve, and maintain our entire library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation.

* Hiring: Hire, promote, and remove underperformers to maintain a high-output, accountable team culture

Qualifications

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role is Not for You If:



* You view this as "just a job" rather than something you take personal pride in building

title: Final Cut Pro - Video Editor Wanted| Long-Term Role
description:
Company: Mythology Marketing & Production

Hours: Full-Time

Rate: Negotiable based on experience



About Us

Mythology Marketing & Production is a full-service digital marketing agency based in New York. We produce high-performance social media video content for contractors, local service companies, and real estate agents. Our content is fast-paced, cinematic, and built to stop the scroll — think punchy hooks, clean motion graphics, and dynamic editing that makes trades and service companies look like premium brands.



We're growing fast and need a skilled video editor who wants to grow with us — not someone building their own freelance client list on the side. This is a dedicated contractor role. We're looking for someone who's all in on being part of a team, takes ownership of their work, and wants a long-term home with an agency that's scaling.



What You'll Be Editing

You'll be working on short-form vertical video content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) for our clients. Videos range from 30 to 90 seconds. Content includes:



Contractor and home service brand videos

Personal brand / talking head content for real estate agents

Property showcase videos (listings, walkthroughs, neighborhood tours)

Real estate agent branding and authority content

Job transformation (before/after) videos

Sales and trust-building content for field reps



Reference video for editing style:


==

Watch this video before applying. This is the look, feel, and energy we are going for. If you can match or exceed this quality, we want to hear from you.



Requirements:



• Software



Final Cut Pro — this is non-negotiable. All editing is done in FCP. Do not apply if you use Premiere, DaVinci, or CapCut exclusively.



• Motion Graphics & VFX



Motion VFX plugin experience is required. You must know how to install, use, and customize Motion VFX templates within Final Cut Pro.

Ability to apply and modify motion graphics overlays, transitions, and title sequences from Motion VFX libraries.



• Transitions & Sound Design



Ryan Nangle transitions — you must have experience using Ryan Nangle's FCP transition packs or be familiar with his style of whip cuts, glitch transitions, and kinetic edits.

SounDesign — experience using SounDesign's sound effects library is required. Every cut, transition, and motion graphic should have intentional sound design behind it. Whooshes, impacts, risers, and UI sounds must be used purposefully to elevate the edit — not slapped on randomly.

Smooth, intentional transitions that match music beats and energy shifts.



• Captions / Subtitles



Must be able to produce clean, styled captions synced to speech.

Experience with caption styles that are on-brand for social media (bold, mobile-readable, punchy word-by-word or line-by-line reveals).

Bonus: Familiarity with auto-caption plugins or workflows within FCP.



• General Editing Skills



Strong sense of pacing and rhythm — you cut to the music, not just the words.

Experience editing branding videos, on-site construction content, or real estate content

Ability to work with multi-angle footage and choose the best angles naturally.

Color grading to a clean, polished look (not flat, not over-processed).

Audio cleanup: background noise reduction, volume leveling, music mixing under voiceover.

Speed ramps and slow-motion effects for cinematic 
nts.

Ability to follow a shot list / scene table and translate it into a finished edit without heavy hand-holding.



* Workflow & Communication



Able to receive footage and direction via 
 (we use 
 for all review and feedback).

Reliable turnaround times — typically 24–48 hours per video depending on length and complexity.

Responsive on messaging (we use WhatsApp or Slack for communication).

Comfortable with revision rounds and direct feedback without ego.





Bonus (Not Required, But Will Get You Noticed)



Experience editing for trades/contractor/home service brands

Experience editing real estate content — property walkthroughs, agent branding, listing videos

Familiarity with social media content strategy and why certain edits perform better

Ability to create simple lower thirds or text animations inside Motion

Experience editing content for U.S.-based clients with fast-paced marketing needs





How to Apply

Send the following to be considered:



Portfolio link — your best 3–5 short-form video edits. Instagram, YouTube, Google Drive, or 
 link is fine.

Confirmation that you use Final Cut Pro and have access to Motion VFX and Ryan Nangle transition packs.

Your rate — tell us your preferred hourly rate.

Your availability — confirm you are available full-time and let us know your typical working hours.

One sentence about why the reference video linked above works (shows us you actually watched it and understand editing intent).



We are not looking for the cheapest option, and we are not looking for someone who is juggling 10 other clients or trying to grow their own freelance business. We want a dedicated tea
mber who is focused, communicates well, and wants to be part of something that is growing. If that's you, we'd love to see your work.



Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant – Crestline Digital (Remote | Full-Time)

About Crestline Digital

Crestline Digital is a U.S.-based web agency founded in 2019 and headquartered in Austin, Texas. We specialize in helping small and medium-sized businesses in Europe build a professional online presence — websites, local SEO, and digital outreach. Over the past few years we've grown to a team of 20+ people working fully remotely across the globe, serving hundreds of clients in Italy, Spain, and France. Our model is simple: we find businesses that need a website, we build it, we deliver it. Fast, clean, no fluff.

We're not a startup figuring things out — we have systems, we have clients, and we're expanding our team to keep up with demand.

The Role

We're hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to support our Italy operations team. You'll work directly with the operations manager on day-to-day tasks. This is a stable, long-term role for someone who's organized, communicates well, and wants to grow with a company that's genuinely scaling.

What You'll Be Doing

Researching and organizing business leads via Google and spreadsheets

Keeping Google Sheets trackers updated and accurate

Supporting outreach campaigns and daily operations

Communicating with the team via
 and messaging tools

Comfortable with Google Sheets / Excel

Fast learner — we use tools like Lovable, 
, and others

Reliable, consistent, proactive communicator

Prior VA or web experience is a plus but not required — we train the right person



What We Offer



?25,000/month fixed salary

Stable, long-term position (we don't do short contracts)

Clear daily targets and structured workflow

Supportive team with real room to grow



To Apply

Send a short message (3–5 sentences) telling us who you are and why this role is a good fit for you. Write AUSTIN in your subject line so we know you read this post.

title: Full-Time YouTube Editor + Shorts Specialist + Growth Strategist
description:
We’re a fast-growing real estate media brand creating YouTube and short-form content focused on helping people make smarter real estate decisions.



We’re looking for a full-time YouTube expert who can:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos

 • Create high-performing short-form content

 • Support scripting and content ideas

 • Help grow the channel



This is not just an editing job.

We want someone who understands how YouTube works and how to make content perform.



What You’ll Be Doing



YouTube Long-Form Editing

 • Edit 10–20 minute videos with strong pacing and storytelling

 • Add b-roll, graphics, captions, and sound design

 • Improve flow and retention (not just visuals)



Short-Form Content (Custom Content)

 • Edit short videos (usually under 2 minutes) from raw footage

 • Add captions, b-roll, and visual elements

 • Focus on strong hooks and keeping attention

 • Create content for Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



YouTube Growth & Strategy

 • Help come up with video ideas that will perform

 • Assist with titles, hooks, and overall structure

 • Understand retention, CTR, and watch time

 • Bring ideas to improve channel performance



Script & Content Support

 • Help improve scripts, hooks, and video structure

 • Contribute ideas for both long-form and short-form content



Team Support

 • Help edit videos for agents on our team

 • Maintain consistent quality across content

 • Be reliable with communication and deadlines



Who This Is For



You:

 • Have experience editing YouTube videos and short-form content

 • Understand what makes videos perform, not just look good

 • Know how to improve retention, watch time, and engagement

 • Can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions

 • Are reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio (YouTube + Shorts/Reels/TikTok)

 • Experience working with creators, brands, or channels

 • Understanding of YouTube strategy and content structure

 • Full-time availability and reliable internet



???? How To Apply (REQUIRED)



If you do not follow these steps, your application will not be considered.



1. Portfolio



Send:

 • 2–3 YouTube videos you edited

 • 3–5 short-form videos you edited

 • Links to channels or brands you’ve worked with

 • Brief explanation of your role



2. Background



Answer these questions:

 • What YouTube channels or creators have you worked with?

 • Have you helped grow a channel? If yes, how?

 • What do you think makes a video perform well on YouTube?



3. Test Project (Important)



Selected applicants will be given:

 • A 5-minute YouTube clip

 • A short-form raw video (under 2 minutes)



You will edit both.



We will evaluate:

 • Hook and pacing

 • Storytelling and structure

 • Retention editing

 • Use of b-roll and captions

 • Overall editing decisions



This is the most important step.



Compensation

 • Full-time role

 • Pay based on experience

 • Long-term opportunity



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow quickly.



As we expand, you may:

 • Support multiple real estate agents and teams

 • Take on a lead editor role

 • Help manage content across multiple channels

 • Play a bigger role in strategy and growth



Final Note



We are not looking for a basic editor.



We are looking for someone who understands:

 • YouTube

 • Content

 • Attention



If that’s you, apply and show us your work.
