You will receive raw footage on a regular basis and turn it into engaging, high-quality videos optimized for social media.



This is an ongoing position with consistent weekly work.



Responsibilities:

Cut and trim raw footage into engaging videos

Add captions/subtitles (essential)

Include background music and sound effects

Add basic transitions, zooms, and visual effects

Follow a specific editing style (references will be provided)

Deliver videos in vertical format (9:16)



Video Length and Guidelines:

Typical video length: 10–60 seconds

Maximum length: 180 seconds

Videos should always be as short as possible while staying engaging

Do not artificially extend videos — pacing and retention are key

Final video length is defined by us, not the editor



Quality and Delivery Requirements:

Videos must be delivered in high quality (minimum 2K resolution, vertical format 9:16)

Strict 24-hour turnaround per video is required

Ability to handle consistent weekly volume



Payment:

Payment per video, based on final length:

0–30 sec: $X

30–60 sec: $X

60–120 sec: $X

120–180 sec: $X

Consistent weekly volume

Long-term collaboration



Requirements:

Experience editing TikTok / Instagram Reels / Shorts

Strong sense for pacing and viewer retention

Ability to create dynamic and engaging edits

Fast turnaround time

Good communication



To Apply:

Please send:

Examples of previous work

Your price per tier (based on length)

Your turnaround time



Bonus (Optional):

Experience with viral-style editing (hooks, captions, fast pacing)

Ability to improve content performance

title: Marketing Technical & Automation Specialist (GoHighLevel Expert)
description:
Company: Mill Creek Marketing

Location: Remote

Time Zone: 9am-5pm CST, Mon–Fri 

Hours: Full-time (30-40 hrs/wk)  

Pay: $8 - $10/hr depending on experience 



THE ROLE



Mill Creek Marketing is hiring a Marketing Technical & Automation Specialist to build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our clients’ marketing and sales pipelines.



This role is for someone who is deeply experienced in GoHighLevel and marketing tech infrastructure — not a beginner.



You will be responsible for the technical backbone of client delivery, ensuring that funnels, websites, tracking, automations, and integrations are built correctly and operating smoothly.



This is not a task-only role.



We are looking for someone who:



• Understands how marketing systems actually work

• Can take direction and run with projects independently

• Identifies opportunities to improve systems and client experience

• Builds clean, reliable infrastructure that scales



ABOUT MILL CREEK MARKETING



Mill Creek Marketing helps residential contractors grow their businesses without creating more chaos.



We specialize in building the marketing and sales systems contractors need to scale profitably — including lead generation, pipeline management, automation, and sales system infrastructure. 



Our clients rely on us not just for marketing, but for the systems behind the marketing.



OUR CORE VALUES (ROOTS)



Raise The Standard

Outwork Bad Days

Opportunity Mindset

Take Extreme Ownership

Simplify & Systematize



WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



You will own the technical setup and optimization of marketing and sales systems for our clients and for us as an agency. 



This includes:



GoHighLevel System Builds



• Full CRM setup for new clients

• Pipeline builds and automation workflows

• Smart lists, triggers, custom values, and tagging structures

•
/SMS campaign deployment

• Lead routing and notification systems



Funnel & Website Development



• Building funnels inside GoHighLevel

• Building landing pages and websites in WordPress

• Form integrations and conversion optimization

• Ensuring mobile responsiveness and fast page load



Marketing Tracking Infrastructure



• Installing and verifying Meta Pixel events

• Setting up Google Tag Manager tracking

• Troubleshooting conversion tracking issues

• Implementing attribution tools such as Cometly or Hyros



Integrations & Automation



• Connecting tools via Zapier or Make

• Managing webhooks and API integrations

• CRM integrations and automation logic

• Troubleshooting broken automations



Systems Optimization



• Identifying broken or inefficient workflows

• Improving automation and pipeline structures

• Recommending system improvements

• Reducing operational friction for the team



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE & ON THIS TEAM



Within the first 30-45 days you will:



• Launch new client GHL setups within 5–7 days of onboarding

• Deploy reactivation campaigns within 48–72 hours

• Ensure tracking and pixels are firing correctly across platforms

• Reduce automation errors and tech issues

• Improve internal systems and documentation



The best candidates will also proactively suggest improvements like:



• New automation opportunities

• Better tracking setups

• More efficient workflows

• Improvements to the client experience



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



You should already be comfortable working independently inside the following systems:



GoHighLevel



• Workflow automation

• Pipeline setup

• Smart lists and tagging

• Custom values and triggers

• A2P setup and SMS/email automation



WordPress



• Landing page builds

• Funnel page creation

• Plugin configuration

• Form integrations



Marketing Tracking



• Meta Pixel setup and event verification

• Google Tag Manager

• Conversion tracking troubleshooting

• Attribution tools like Cometly or Hyros



Technical Skills



• Zapier or Make integrations

• DNS/domain troubleshooting

• Script embeds and event tracking

• Automation logic (if/then triggers)



THE KIND OF PERSON WHO THRIVES IN THIS ROLE



You may be a great fit if you:



• Are extremely detail-oriented and very thorough 

• Naturally think in systems and processes

• Enjoy solving technical problems

• Take ownership of your work without being chased or micromanaged 

• Are comfortable figuring things out independently when needed 



You don't wait to be told every little step and sub-step. You take the objective and direction given to you and execute it intelligently, asking for help when you've exhausted your other resources. 



COMMUNICATION EXPECTATIONS



We run a high-accountability team and rely on clear, proactive communication.



You will be expected to:



• Check Slack and ClickUp daily

• Communicate blockers or confusion early

• Update tasks and progress consistently in ClickUp 

• Respond promptly during main working hours (9am-5pm CST)



THIS ROLE IS DEFINITELY NOT A GOOD FIT FOR YOU IF:



• You need step-by-step instructions for everything 

• You frequently miss details, rush through work, or often have to correct or redo your work 

• You disappear for long periods without communication

• You are not comfortable troubleshooting technical issues

• You take feedback personally and are hurt by it, rather than as a chance to grow and get better 



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT FOR YOU IF:



• You enjoy building marketing systems

• You like fixing broken tech and improving processes

• You are highly organized, thorough, and detail-oriented

• You want to grow with a fast-moving team



HOW TO APPLY



Send us a message with the subject line: "Ricky Bobby Tech Specialist"



Record us a personalized 3-5 minute Loom video where you:



- Introduce yourself and your background

- Explain your experience as a technical specialist working in GHL 

- Walk through 1-2 case studies (blur any sensitive info) where you built or improved a system or workflow 

- Show how you self-QA your work to avoid errors 

- Tell us why you believe you are the perfect fit for this specific role at Mill Creek Marketing 



Attach your resume, and any relevant screenshots, references, or portfolio links.

title: Full stack Developer Needed: Real-Time E-commerce Dashboard with AI (Claude)
description:
We are looking for a skilled developer to build a custom data dashboard and AI-powered analysis system for our e-commerce operations on 
. The goal of this project is to create a central platform where we can monitor performance, analyze opportunities, and receive automated recommendations to improve our product listings, organic rankings, and advertising results.



The system needs to integrate directly with the 
 Retailer API and Advertising API to continuously collect data such as product information, pricing, buy box percentage, visits, organic rankings, and advertising performance including impressions, clicks, spend, and sales. This data should be stored in a structured database and updated frequently, preferably close to real-time within API limitations, so that we always have an accurate and up-to-date overview of our performance.



On top of this data layer, we want to integrate Claude AI (Anthropic) to act as an intelligent analysis engine. The AI should process the collected data and generate clear, actionable insights. This includes identifying opportunities in the market, analyzing pricing and positioning, suggesting improvements for product listings such as titles and descriptions, and optimizing advertising campaigns by detecting underperforming keywords and uncovering new opportunities. The output of the AI should not be generic text, but structured and directly usable insights that can help us make better decisions quickly.



The dashboard itself needs to be clean, fast, and easy to understand. For each product, we want a clear overview of key metrics such as organic ranking, price position compared to competitors, buy box percentage, and performance trends over time. In addition, the dashboard should display AI-generated insights, recommended actions, and performance summaries in a way that allows us to immediately see what needs attention. The system should be built with scalability in mind, so we can easily expand it with additional features, products, or marketplaces in the future.



We are looking for someone who is not only technically strong but also able to think along with us on a business level. Experience with APIs, data pipelines, dashboards, and AI integrations is important. Experience within e-commerce or marketplaces is a strong advantage. You should be comfortable designing a structured system from scratch and making decisions about the best technical approach where needed.



The final result should be a working system that includes the backend, database, API integrations, AI connection, and a usable dashboard, along with clear documentation so we can maintain and expand it over time.



This project is not a one-time job. We are actively building multiple automation systems within our company, so there is a strong opportunity for continuous work and long-term collaboration if the cooperation is successful.

title: Client Success Coordinator / Transaction Coordinator for Florida
description:
FULL JOB DESCRIPTION



Position: Client Success Coordinator (Real Estate Transaction Coordination)

Location: Remote – Philippines

Schedule: Full-time, Monday–Friday, 9AM–5PM EST (Florida)

Weekend Availability: Occasional weekend support as needed

Compensation: $900–$1,100 USD/month + per-file bonus ($25/file closed)

Paid Trial: 2 weeks

Probation: 90 days



About the Role



We are a fast-growing real estate transaction coordinator (TC) business seeking a dedicated Client Success Coordinator / Transaction Coordinator to join our team. Your role is to be the first line of communication and support for our agents and clients — ensuring they feel taken care of, updated, and confident throughout the transaction process.



You will handle inbound calls, resolve issues, update our CRM/software systems, and communicate clearly with agents and the management team.



This role is remote, requires strong English proficiency, proactive thinking, and the ability to solve problems independently.



Responsibilities



Client Communication & Support



Answer inbound calls/messages from agents and clients



Provide timely updates, solutions, and follow-up



Deliver exceptional customer service with a friendly, confident tone



Transaction Support



Handling contract to close process for 20 files minimum per month



Track milestones and deadlines



Assist with document follow-up and coordination where needed



Flag potential issues early to the management team



Systems & CRM Management



Update CRM (e.g. Follow Up Boss, BoldTrail)



Document all call outcomes, client updates, and resolved issues



Maintain clean, accurate digital records



Internal Coordination



Communicate with the transaction coordinator team + management



Report any recurring issues, concerns, or client trends



Assist in improving SOPs and workflows



General Expectations



Attend weekly check-ins



Be online and responsive during EST business hours



Uphold professionalism in every client interaction



Be available on camera and audio during working hours in our virtual company room



Requirements



Excellent English speaking & writing skills (clear, confident, neutral accent)



Strong problem-solving ability — can identify solutions quickly



Experience in real estate admin, customer support, or TC work (preferred but not required)



Fast learner with tech-savvy skills



Familiarity with CRMs, workflow tools, and communication platforms



Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks



Reliable internet + backup plan



Compensation



Base Salary: $900–$1,100 USD/month, depending on experience



Bonus: $25 USD per closed file



Paid training during the 2 week trial. After trial, there will be an offer for a 90-day probation period.



Salary review at the end of 90 days based on performance.



This compensation range is aligned with OnlineJobs.ph market rates for high-performing, English-proficient support and TC-adjacent roles.



How to Apply: 



Please submit the following:



Your resume



A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself



Your experience with customer support or real estate (if any)



Your expected salary



Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link



DISC profile



Typing speed test



Internet speed screen shot

title: Senior PPC Account Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY



The Account Manager (AM) is a client-facing role responsible for supporting day-to-day success across a portfolio of marketing accounts. AMs work closely with internal teams to keep projects moving, ensure the timely delivery of campaigns and assets, and maintain strong client communication. They act as the central point of coordination, translating client needs into actionable internal tasks, and ensuring updates, follow-ups, and reporting are clear and accurate.



While strategic planning is typically owned in collaboration with Analysts, AMs must have a solid understanding of marketing fundamentals and be comfortable discussing performance results and project objectives. Success in this role requires strong communication, task management skills, and a proactive mindset to keep clients informed and engaged.



AMs are expected to use Slack and Asana regularly to manage projects, collaborate with teams, and communicate with clients. This role is ideal for professionals with marketing exposure and a strong client service foundation who are ready to take the lead on execution and client relationship management.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Communication & Relationship Management

Act as the day-to-day contact for assigned clients, ensuring timely responses and clear updates.

Lead recurring client calls, prepare agendas, and document action items and outcomes both internally and externally.

Deliver follow-ups, meeting recaps, and task updates to clients and internal teams using Slack,
, and Asana.

Build rapport with clients and understand their preferences, communication style, and working cadence.



Project Coordination & Task Management

Translate client requests into detailed tasks, coordinating with Analysts, Creative, and SEO teams as needed.

Own the flow of projects in Asana—setting due dates, assigning tasks, and following up on progress.

Ensure timelines are met and deliverables meet quality standards before going to the client.

Help keep clients accountable for reviews, feedback, and asset delivery.



Marketing Strategy & Performance Analysis

Understand core marketing metrics and KPIs to speak confidently about campaign trends.

Collaborate with Analysts to prepare insights and recommendations and present them clearly in client-facing updates.

Support campaign planning and optimizations by identifying strategic priorities linked to client goals.

Use tools like TapClicks and GA4 to interpret data and translate results into client-friendly updates.



Account Growth & Retention

Spot growth opportunities through performance review, client feedback, or shifting business needs.

Collaborate with internal leads to scope and pitch upsells or service expansions.

Monitor account health, flag potential churn risks early, and collaborate internally to develop 



Team Collaboration & Internal Best Practices

Work closely with Analysts, SEO, Creative, and leadership to deliver a seamless client experience.

Adhere to SOPs and workflows, maintaining high standards for delivery and communication.

Contribute to process improvement efforts, template development, and mentorship of newer tea
mbers when applicable



Process Improvement & Continuous Learning

Stay current on industry trends, new platform features, and optimization techniques.

Evaluate and test new tools and methodologies to improve campaign performance.

Proactively contribute to improving internal processes, workflow efficiency, and overall team effectiveness.

Share insights and learnings with the broader team to enhance collective knowledge.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS



2+ years of experience in a client-facing role, ideally within a marketing agency or digital advertising environment.

Proven success managing accounts, particularly those involving paid media or multi-channel campaigns.

Strong communication skills, including writing client
s and presenting updates in meetings.

Familiarity with Asana (or other PM tools), Slack, and marketing performance dashboards.

Solid understanding of digital marketing channels (e.g., Google Ads, Meta) and common KPIs.

Organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple accounts and timelines simultaneously.

Collaborative mindset and a willingness to ask questions, flag issues, and support team execution.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS



3+ years of experience in an agency or client services role.

Exposure to multi-channel campaign delivery or account management.

Experience working closely with creative teams, analysts, or technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, CRM tools (e.g., HubSpot), or conversion tracking.



WHY JOIN US?



Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

Unlimited PTO (Responsible PTO – take the time you need, with the expectation that it aligns with client commitments and team goals)

Flexible, remote-first work environment

Professional development opportunities

Collaborative, growth-focused culture

title: Paid Media Account Analyst
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

The Paid Media Account Analyst is a skilled digital marketing professional with 2+ years of hands-on paid ads experience. This role centers on tactical implementation, managing and optimizing multi-channel campaigns across platforms like Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, and programmatic. Account Analysts are expected to take full ownership of campaign execution and performance, confidently managing the day-to-day health of their accounts with minimal oversight. While they collaborate with Senior Account Analysts and Account Managers to shape broader strategy, they are accountable for translating those plans into results. They also play a key role in supporting junior analysts by offering mentorship, feedback, and tactical guidance.



Ideal candidates should be comfortable analyzing performance data, identifying optimization opportunities, and executing media strategies with precision. They should have a solid understanding of cross-channel and full-funnel marketing, enabling them to connect tactical execution with broader client goals. Effective collaboration with account managers and other analysts is essential, as is the ability to clearly communicate results, insights, and tactical recommendations to internal teams.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Campaign Management & Optimization

Build, manage, and optimize paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, Programmatic) independently and with the guidance of senior tea
mbers.

Conduct regular performance analysis, making adjustments to budgets, bids, and targeting to meet KPIs.

Ensure campaigns consistently align with client objectives and strategic guidelines.

Leverage cross-channel insights to optimize the customer journey and maximize ROAS.



Strategic Support & Insight Generation

Execute tactical plans based on strategic guidance from senior analysts and strategists.

Analyze performance data to identify short-term optimization opportunities and tactical improvements.

Provide platform-specific recommendations to enhance campaign performance within established strategic frameworks.



Quality Assurance & Accuracy

Conduct thorough quality assurance checks on campaigns, ensuring correct implementation of tracking and budgets.

Maintain high accuracy and attention to detail across all deliverables.

Correct and proactively address any issues before client delivery.



Team Collaboration & Mentorship

Support junior analysts with tactical execution and platform best practices.

Contribute to onboarding and training initiatives, sharing tactical knowledge regularly.

Foster a collaborative, execution-focused team environment that emphasizes precision and efficiency.



Cross-Functional Communication

Work closely with Account Managers and cross-functional teams to execute campaign tactics effectively.

Clearly communicate performance insights, tactical updates, and optimization recommendations to internal stakeholders.

Participate in client calls when necessary to provide tactical support and platform insights.



Process Improvement & Continuous Learning

Stay current on industry trends, new platform features, and optimization techniques.

Evaluate and test new tools and methodologies to improve campaign performance.

Share insights and learnings with the broader team to enhance collective knowledge.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

2+ years of hands-on experience managing multi-platform paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, programmatic).

Strong grasp of campaign optimization, budget management, and platform-specific best practices.

Strong analytical skills with experience interpreting complex data sets.

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.

Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

Proficiency with communication and project management tools (Asana and Slack).



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

3+ years of hands-on experience managing multi-platform paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, programmatic).

Experience managing mid-level accounts or diverse client portfolios across multiple industries.

Proven track record of supporting junior analysts and contributing to team growth.

Certifications such as Google Ads and Meta Blueprint.

Familiarity with niche and growing ad platforms (e.g., Reddit, TikTok, Criteo) or advanced programmatic tools.

title: GoHighLevel Setup Specialist (CRM, SMS Automation, Lead Follow-Up System)
description:
We are a small greenhouse company based in Oregon generating leads through
 (Meta) ads and our website.



We are looking for an experienced GoHighLevel specialist to help us build a clean, simple system to manage and follow up with leads.



Our goal is to:



Respond to new leads immediately via SMS



Track all leads in one place



Build a simple pipeline from lead ? quote ? sale



Automate follow-ups so no leads are missed



We are NOT looking for anything overly complex. Simple, clean, and effective is the goal.



Current Setup:



Meta Lead Ads



Squarespace website (quote request form)



Zapier (currently sending leads to Mailchimp)



Considering moving fully into GoHighLevel



Scope of Work:



We need help setting up GoHighLevel to:



1. Lead Capture & Integration



Connect Meta lead ads to GoHighLevel (via Zapier or native)



Connect Squarespace form submissions to GoHighLevel



Ensure all leads are captured and deduplicated



2. SMS &
 Automation



Set up instant SMS response for:



Meta leads



Website quote requests (different message tone)



Set up simple plain-text
 follow-ups



Build a basic follow-up sequence (day 1, day 3, day 7, etc.)



3. Pipeline Setup



Create a simple pipeline such as:



New Lead



Contacted



Quote Sent



Follow Up



Closed



4. Call & SMS System



Set up GoHighLevel phone number (Twilio)



Enable call tracking and SMS conversations



Configure missed call text-back



5. Organization & Simplicity



Keep everything easy to use



Avoid overcomplicating workflows



Make it easy for a small team to manage daily



Ideal Candidate:



Strong experience with GoHighLevel (must)



Has built CRM + automation systems before



Understands lead follow-up and conversion (not just tech)



Comfortable working with Zapier



Bonus: experience with Meta lead ads or service businesses



**** To be considered for this position please tell me:  How would you set up an automation where a new
 lead receives an 
 immediately, then a follow-up
 the next day, and another follow-up 3 days later? Please explain step-by-step.



We will also need referral's and references from past and current employers.



Project Details:



Initial setup project (fixed or hourly)



Potential for ongoing work (optimization, improvements)

title: Virtual Assistant – Full Training Provided
description:

We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.

Experience as a VA is a plus but not required; full training is provided for the right candidate.



How to Apply:

/disc-personality-test/

p&bt=0>=normal

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

4 - Attach your updated resume, highlighting your most relevant experience and skills.?

Video(s)

5 - Record a video or multiple short videos answering the questions below. Upload them to a platform (e.g., Google Drive, YouTube, Loom) and make sure the links are public/viewable.

a. About You & Your Goals

Introduce yourself and share your hobbies/passions.

Be very specific: What are you saving money for? What specific item/asset is it? When do you expect to acquire it? How do you plan on achieving that goal?

b. Work & Tech Setup

Explain how you could have made it easier/faster/better using AI.





 Subject Line



When you send your application, use this exact subject line:

“Virtual Assistant Application – [Your Full Name] – [Your Main Skill]”

In the body of your
/message, briefly share:

What you already know you are good at.

What skill(s) you want to learn next from this role (e.g., SEO, automation, copywriting, editing, etc.).

title: Social Media Manager — Full Brand Suite
description:
Remote | Philippines-Based Preferred | Part-Time to Full-Time



Who We Are

We are a fast-moving group of brands run by a construction company owner based in the Cincinnati, Ohio area. We are not a slow corporate team. We move fast, we hold high standards, and we reward people who take ownership and drive results without being told twice.



You will be managing content and growth across four brands simultaneously.



Green Valley Contractors — A commercial and residential drywall and construction subcontractor operating across Indiana, Ohio, and Kentucky. The content here is jobsite documentation, crew culture, project showcases, and B2B credibility building.



Terminal Positivity — The owner’s personal brand. Leadership, entrepreneurship, faith, family, and the real story of building a company from the ground up. This brand is the growth engine for everything else.



Project Karabaw — A nonprofit focused on providing essential resources, discipline, and self-defense training for kids in the Philippines. Content here is mission-driven, emotional, and community-focused.



Flawless Hair and Makeup — A hair and makeup company owned and operated by the owner’s wife. We are launching TikTok and TikTok Shop for this brand and need someone who can build it from the ground up and drive product sales through short form content.



What This Role Actually Is

This is not a post-and-disappear role. This is a full content operation. You are the engine. You own the strategy, the execution, the reporting, and the results. If something is not growing, you figure out why and you fix it. You do not wait to be told.

You will be expected to study what the top performers in each space are doing, apply those frameworks immediately, and report on what is working and what is not every single week.

This role will not work for someone who needs constant direction, explains why targets are hard, or treats consistency as an achievement. Consistency is the minimum. Growth is the job.



What You Will Be Doing

Creating and publishing daily short form video content across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts for all four brands.

Managing and growing each brand’s presence on Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Actively engaging every day — responding to comments, commenting on relevant content in each niche, and building community presence across all platforms.

Building and managing TikTok Shop for Flawless Hair and Makeup from launch through consistent revenue-generating activity.

Submitting a weekly performance report every Friday covering follower counts by platform, reach to new accounts, engagement rates, best performing content, and what you are testing and adjusting the following week.

Repurposing existing content — jobsite photos and videos, personal brand 
nts, nonprofit impact stories, and beauty content — into platform-native short form posts.

Staying ahead of algorithm changes and platform trends and implementing them without being asked.



What We Are Looking For

You have been doing this for at least two years and you have results you can point to. Not follower counts on accounts you managed for yourself. Actual brand growth you drove for someone else.

You understand TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts at a technical level. You know what completion rate means, why saves and shares matter more than likes, and how the algorithm d
 who sees your content.

You have experience with TikTok Shop or are ready to learn it fast and own it completely.

You are self-directed. You do not need a daily check-in. You bring the plan and you execute it. You communicate proactively when something changes and you flag problems before they become patterns.

You can manage multiple brands with different voices and audiences without letting them bleed into each other.

You write well in English and communicate clearly and professionally.

You are hungry. You treat the growth of these brands like it matters because it does.



What You Will Not Be Doing

Waiting for content to be created for you. Raw material will be provided and you are expected to work with it and create from it. You are not a scheduler. You are a creator and a strategist.

Asking for direction on things you should already know. If you need to be taught basic platform strategy this is not the right role.

Submitting a monthly screenshot and calling it a report.



Compensation

Base pay plus a performance bonus structure tied to growth metrics across all four brands.

Bonuses are earned by hitting results above the baseline, not for doing the job. We pay well for people who perform and we have zero interest in paying average wages for average effort.



How to Apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: Social Media Manager Application.

Only applications sent to this
 will be processed.

Include a short video introducing yourself, two to three examples of brand accounts you have managed and the results you drove, and one paragraph on how you would approach building TikTok Shop for a hair and makeup brand from zero.

If you cannot send a video introduction do not apply. If you cannot show results do not apply. If you are the right person you already know it.

title: Full-Time Cold Caller | Pay Increase + Bonuses
description:
We’re a US-based roofing company expanding our proven call center operation, and we’re looking for experienced cold callers who are confident speaking with US homeowners and motivated by performance pay.



If you’re comfortable on the dialer, know how to handle objections, and can turn conversations into booked jobs or sales, this role offers stable hours, clear pay increases, and strong bonus potential.



This is not a startup script, we already have a system that works. We just need reliable dialers who can perform.



???? Compensation (Performance-Based Pay)

Starting pay is $3/hour, with automatic increases every pay period (2 weeks) based on results.



Base Pay: $3/hour

2+ sales in a pay period ? $4/hour for that period

4+ sales in a pay period ? $5/hour for that period

$25 bonus for every sale



Most dialers make 2+ sales per week, which usually means:

$4/hour + $50+ in bonuses



Strong performers regularly reach:

$5/hour + $100+ per week in bonuses



There is real earning potential for consistent callers.



? Schedule

40 hours per week

Monday – Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

1 hour unpaid lunch



Optional Saturdays: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (not required, but encouraged)



We are looking for people who want steady long-term work, not short-term freelancers.



? Requirements

Excellent English fluency

Natural American accent

Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

Experience with US roofing, solar, or real estate campaigns preferred



Applicants who do not meet these requirements will not be interviewed.



???? Application Requirement (Required for Interview)

To move forward, send a 30-second video explaining:

Your cold calling experience

Any roofing / solar / insurance / real estate campaign experience



Which mornings you are available for a 9 AM CST interview



We are conducting interviews every morning at 9:00 AM CST for the next two weeks, and we are looking for people who can start immediately.



If you’re a consistent dialer who wants steady hours, performance pay, and real bonuses, this is a good opportunity with a company that already has a working system.



— Graham

Roofing Solutions

title: Music Industy/Artist Expert
description:
Looking for an invidiual who has experience working in the music industry, scouting artists, and doing outreach to them. 



We are a music rights company working on a project that requires someone with genuine hands-on experience in the music industry.



We are looking for one person who knows how to find independent artists, research their profiles, and reach out to them effectively. This is a research and outreach role. You will be identifying specific artists that meet a defined criteria, building profiles on them, and making contact on our behalf.



This is not a role for someone who has read about the music industry. It is for someone who has worked in it, whether at a label, publisher, distributor, PRO, management company, or music tech startup. You already know how the ecosystem works. You know the difference between an independent artist and a major label artist. You know where to find artists online and how to approach them without getting ignored.



What you will be doing

Researching and identifying independent artists that match a specific profile we will share with you once onboarded. Building detailed profiles on each artist including their catalog, streaming presence, distributor, and contact information. Reaching out to artists directly via social media,
, and other platforms. Following up and managing conversations through to a warm introduction. Reporting weekly on progress.



What we need from you

Real experience working with or around artists in the music industry. Proven ability to find and contact independent artists at scale. Familiarity with music databases and research tools. Strong written communication, you know how to write an outreach message that gets a response. Self-directed and comfortable working remotely with minimal supervision. Bonus if you have contacts or experience in international music markets, specifically Russia, Eastern Europe, Southeast Asia, or Africa.



You will be paid intially based upon every client that joins from your closing. Later on, when you become integral you will be paid bonuses, etc. You are sure to be paid well once things settle in.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor For Online Brand (Part-Time)



15 hours/week | Remote | Work Directly with Founder & Marketing Team



We’re hiring an elite Video Editor to help create high-quality content for a fast-growing online coaching company + personal brand.

If you enjoy turning raw footage into engaging, high-performing content — and want to be part of a brand that’s scaling quickly — this role is for you.

You’ll work directly with the founder (Austin Netzley) and our marketing team to produce content across social media, YouTube, and podcast platforms.



About 2X



At 2X, we help founders scale their businesses while getting their time back.

Our clients are $500k–$10M service businesses looking to grow without being stuck in the day-to-day.



We produce a high volume of content across:



• Social media (Reels, Shorts, etc.)

• YouTube

• Podcast



And we’re just getting started.



The Mission of This Role



Your mission is simple:



Turn raw footage into clean, engaging, high-performing video content — consistently.

You’ll help us increase content output, improve quality, and support the growth of the brand.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Edit short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style)

• Edit long-form YouTube videos

• Edit podcast episodes (video + clips)

• Add b-roll, captions, and visual enhancements

• Cut clips from long-form content into short-form content

• Organize and manage video files

• Collaborate with marketing team on content flow

• We will provide all raw footage — your job is to make it great.



The Outcomes You Own



• High-quality, polished video content delivered consistently

• Fast turnaround times on edits

• Engaging short-form clips that perform well on social

• Clean, professional YouTube and podcast edits

• A smooth, reliable content editing workflow



The Ideal Candidate



You’re someone who:



• Has strong video editing skills (Premiere, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.)

• Understands social media content styles and trends

• Is fast, reliable, and detail-oriented

• Can make content feel clean, modern, and engaging

• Is proactive and takes ownership

• Enjoys working with a growing brand



Bonus if you:



• Have experience editing for coaches, creators, or personal brands

• Understand pacing, hooks, and retention in short-form content



What Success Looks Like (First 30–60 Days)



• You’re consistently delivering edited videos each week

• Content quality is high and improving

• Turnaround time is fast and reliable

• We have a steady flow of short-form and long-form content



… and we can ramp up hours per week. 



Why This Role Is Exciting



• Work directly with the founder

• Be part of a fast-growing brand

• High volume of content = lots of reps and growth

• Opportunity to expand into a larger role over time

• Potential to grow into full-time



Logistics



• Type: Part-Time (15 hrs/week to start)

• Location: Remote

• Growth: Potential to increase hours and move to full-time



How to Apply



Please send:



• Your portfolio (with examples of short-form AND long-form edits)

• A short note on why you’re a great fit

• Your availability - how many hours per week can you commit to

title: Beauty Copywriter with Digital Marketing Experience (Premium Black Haircare Brand
description:
Title: Beauty Copywriter with Digital Marketing Experience (Premium Black Haircare Brand)



Location: Remote

Type: Freelance / Contract

Experience Level: Expert

Budget: Open (based on experience)







About Naturhin



Naturhin is a premium haircare brand created for Black women and men. Our vision is to redefine textured haircare as a luxury household essential, rooted in performance, heritage, and intentional storytelling.



We are not a mass-market brand. Every word we publish must build trust, desire, and authority.



We are looking for an experienced Beauty Copywriter with a Digital Marketing background who understands both brand storytelling and conversion psychology.



?



Role Overview



You will be responsible for crafting high-impact copy that educates, inspires, and converts — while protecting Naturhin’s premium brand voice.



This role sits at the intersection of:

• Luxury branding

• Black hair education

• Digital marketing performance







Key Responsibilities

• Write website copy (homepage, product pages, about page)

• Craft product descriptions that balance education and desire

• Write
 marketing campaigns and flows

• Support paid ads with conversion-focused copy

• Maintain a consistent luxury brand tone across all channels

• Translate hair science into clear, customer-friendly language

• Collaborate with brand, creative, and marketing teams







Required Experience & Skills

• Proven experience as a beauty or skincare copywriter

• Strong understanding of digital marketing funnels

• Experience writing for DTC e-commerce brands

• Familiarity with Black haircare or textured hair markets

• Ability to write luxury-aligned copy (elevated, not salesy)

• Understanding of SEO basics (without keyword stuffing)







Nice to Have

• Experience working with premium or luxury brands

•
 marketing and CRO experience

• Ability to adapt tone for different platforms

• Understanding of haircare ingredients and routines







What Success Looks Like

• Website copy that feels premium, clear, and confident

• Product pages that educate and convert

•
 campaigns that build long-term loyalty

• Copy that strengthens Naturhin’s authority in Black haircare







To Apply

Experience in a hair care brand 

Only a skilful and crafted copywriter



Please include:

1. A short introduction

2. Examples of beauty or DTC brands you’ve written for

3. 2–3 writing samples (web, product, or
 copy)

4. A brief explanation of how you balance brand storytelling with conversion



Start your proposal with “Naturhin Luxury” so we know you read this fully.

title: Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Operations VA — 35+ Unit Portfolio (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
About Us

We operate a 35+ unit short-term rental portfolio across the USA, generating 7-figure annual revenue. Fully remote operation. We host corporate travelers and families — no party houses. We’re building a disciplined, process-driven team and we want people who take ownership, solve problems, and want long-term stability.



The Role

We’re hiring for two VA shifts (indicate your preference in your application):

Morning Shift: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM Eastern Time

Evening Shift: 4:00 PM – 12:00 AM Eastern Time



Schedule: 6 days/week (one agreed day off)

Pay: $5–$6/hr USD depending on experience

Bonuses: Monthly performance bonuses (response time, review scores, low escalation rates)

13th Month: Yes

Growth Path: Lead VA role ($7–$8/hr + team bonus) for strong performers



What You’ll Do Every Shift

Respond to all guest messages within 10 minutes — professional, warm, solution-oriented

Coordinate cleaners and maintenance vendors daily via WhatsApp

Manage early check-ins, late check-outs, extensions, and same-day bookings

File Airbnb Aircover and Resolution Centre claims

Monitor smart locks and cameras — troubleshoot issues, flag rule violations

Complete shift handoff notes — every single shift, no exceptions

Follow SOPs in Notion and flag anything that’s missing or unclear



Requirements

Minimum 2 year experience in Airbnb / STR / property management VA work

Strong written English — C1+ level, professional and guest-ready

Can make decisions without asking permission for routine situations

Reliable internet (50 Mbps+), computer, quiet workspace

Looking for long-term stability (12+ months)



ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE STR / AIRBNB EXPERIENCE.



How to Apply

Message me through OnlineJobs.ph with the following (applications that skip these will not be reviewed):



Start your message with the word FRONTLINE.

How many STR units have you supported at once, and what were your main responsibilities?

Write the exact message you would send to this guest: “Hi, it’s 10:45 PM. The AC is broken and I can’t find parking. I want a refund.” (Do not describe what you’d do — write the actual guest-facing message.)

Which shift are you applying for? (Morning 8AM–4PM ET / Evening 4PM–12AM ET / Open to either)

Confirm you’re open to a 2-week paid trial.

Include Voice Note Intro



We pay biweekly, on time, every time. 13th month included. If you want a stable, long-term role with a growing company and real performance bonuses, apply now.

title: VA - Social Media Manager - Travel Agency
description:
Social Media Manager & General VA (Travel Industry)

Bowles Travel Group | Remote (Philippines Preferred)

Pay: $3/hour to start (growth opportunities available)



Bowles Travel Group is a luxury travel agency focused on high-end vacations, cruises, and curated group experiences around the world.



We don’t just book trips. We create experiences people talk about for years.



We’re growing, and I’m looking for someone who can take our photos, videos, and ideas and turn them into content that actually makes people stop scrolling.



What You’ll Be Doing

This is not a “post and forget” role. You’ll be taking raw content and shaping it into something engaging, clean, and professional across multiple platforms including
, Instagram, and YouTube.



You’ll create reels, shorts, stories, and posts using photos and videos I provide. You’ll edit videos with music, text overlays, and strong hooks. You’ll write captions that sound natural and conversational, not robotic.



You’ll also repurpose content across platforms, maintain a consistent posting schedule, and keep things organized behind the scenes.



On the design side, you’ll be creating clean, professional graphics using Canva. This includes travel flyers, promotional posts, and social media visuals that match a luxury brand feel.



There will also be light general VA work such as organizing content, assisting with
 formatting, helping with travel promotions, and basic CRM updates. If you have experience with simple website design or updates, that’s a strong plus.



What I’m Looking For

-You understand social media, especially short-form video.

-You know how to take something simple and make it engaging.

-You’re comfortable with Canva and have a good eye for clean design.

-You can edit video quickly using tools like CapCut or similar.

-Your written English is strong and sounds natural.

-You are organized, reliable, and don’t need to be chased down to get things done.

-You can take direction, but you also think for yourself.



What I Do Not Want

-Someone who just uses templates and calls it a day.

-Slow communication.

-Someone who needs constant supervision.

-Low-effort work.



Bonus Skills

-Experience in the travel industry is great but not required.

-YouTube experience, copywriting, or basic marketing knowledge is a plus.

-Simple website design (WordPress, Wix, or similar) is also valuable.



Compensation & Growth

-Pay starts at $3/hour.

-This is a long-term opportunity. If you perform well, there is room for increased hours, higher pay, and more responsibility.



30-Day Trial Period

All candidates will begin with a 30-day paid trial at $3/hour.

During that time, I’ll be looking at the quality of your work, your creativity, how you communicate, and how reliable you are.

By the end of the 30 days, it will be clear if this is a long-term fit.

If it is, we move forward and grow.

If not, we part ways professionally.



How to Apply

To be considered, follow these steps carefully:

Send 3 examples of social media posts or videos you’ve created

Include links to any accounts you’ve managed

Send 2 to 3 Canva designs (flyers or social posts)

Record a short video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself



Start your application with the words: TRAVEL READY



Next Step: Screening Test

If you’re shortlisted, you’ll be given a short test.

You’ll create a short-form video, write a caption, design a Canva graphic, and answer a few questions about your process.

This helps me see how you actually work, not just what you say you can do.



Final Note

I’m not looking for average.

I’m looking for someone who takes pride in their work, moves with purpose, and wants to be part of something that’s growing.

If that sounds like you, apply.



Let’s get to work.

description:

title: Urgent Hiring: Integration Support Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Technical Onboarding Specialist with strong communication skills and a solid foundation in automation and CRM integrations. This is not a “button-clicking” role — we need someone who truly understands how systems connect, how data flows, and how to build reliable workflows across different platforms.

If you're a systems thinker who enjoys solving technical problems and guiding non-technical users through integrations, this role is for you.

You’ll support the expansion of our Intake 360 service, which provides on-demand reception and intake for U.S.-based law firms. This role focuses on onboarding clients, gathering requirements, and building integrations that connect our systems with client CRMs.

You must be comfortable communicating through
s and video calls, as this role involves direct interaction with both staff and clients. Strong communication skills are non-negotiable.

Note: Please do not message our pages or contact the CEO directly. All applications will be reviewed only through the instructions provided below.



About the Company

We are a dynamic network of companies, each offering specialized expertise:

Turn Key Ops – We provide top-tier virtual staffing solutions that enable businesses to focus on growth across industries such as medical, real estate, legal, and marketing.

Attorney Assistant – We specialize in virtual assistant services exclusively for law firms, helping them operate more efficiently.

In this role, you’ll support our Intake 360 service, integrating with client CRM systems such as Salesforce, Litify, Lead Docket, HubSpot, and others to enable efficient intake workflows and lead management.



About the Role

Technical Onboarding Specialist – Automation & CRM Integrations

You will be responsible for onboarding new clients, gathering technical requirements, and implementing integrations between internal systems and client CRMs.

This is a client-facing, mid-level technical role. You will work directly with U.S.-based law firms, translate business needs into technical workflows, and ensure accurate and reliable data transfer — including sending data via APIs.

This role is ideal for someone who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and comfortable owning integrations end-to-end.



Core Responsibilities

Lead technical onboarding for new Intake 360 clients

Gather, document, and translate client requirements into integration workflows

Build and maintain automation workflows across various platforms (not limited to any single tool)

Send and receive data between systems using APIs, webhooks, and automation tools

Work closely with Client Success Managers to align technical solutions with client needs

Communicate directly with U.S.-based clients to provide updates, support, and guidance

Troubleshoot and optimize integrations for reliability, scalability, and clean data flow

Standardize integration patterns across multiple CRM systems

Create internal documentation, SOPs, and repeatable onboarding processes

Manage multiple onboarding and integration projects independently

Maintain consistent working hours aligned with U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



Core Qualifications (Must-Have)

Minimum 3 years of experience in automation and system integrations

Strong understanding of how automation works across platforms (not limited to specific tools)

Ability to design workflows that handle real-world business logic and edge cases

Experience working with APIs, webhooks, or data transfer between systems

Strong understanding of data structures and CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Lead Docket, etc.)

3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.

title: Technical Grant Writer
description:
We are looking for a Technical Grant Writer to work with our SR&ED (Scientific Research and Experimental Development) team. 



You are responsible for securing funding by researching, writing, and submitting comprehensive grant proposals. This role supports innovation and growth by obtaining financial support through SR&ED and other grant opportunities, ensuring that the clients' projects and R&D initiatives receive the necessary funding to succeed.



Key responsibilities:-



1. Technical Writing & Proposal Development: Draft, edit, and submit high-quality proposals. Convert complex scientific, clinical, or technical concepts into persuasive narratives.



2. Grant Research & Strategy: Identify and prioritize potential funding opportunities from federal, state, and private foundation sources. Maintain an up-to-date calendar of deadlines.



3. Collaboration with Experts: Work closely with internal team, clients (scientists, engineers etc) and subject matter experts to understand project needs, methodologies, and deliverables.



4. Reporting & Follow-up: Be on top of project deadlines and reportings



Key Requirements:-



1. Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Science or Health



2.  Min. 2 years of experience in technical grant writing with proven successful records. 



3. Ability to interpret and synthesize complex information (e.g., data analysis, scientific literature).



4. Professional command of the English language 



5. Strong analytical, editing, and persuasive writing skills and presentation skills



6. Comfortable in doing presentations and dealing with C-level Executives and Government Bodies



7.  Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite or Google Docs (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), grant management software, task manager software, and CRM databases
salary: From USD5 per hour (Based on experience)
